text: Tempat bagus, sejuk dan asri. Lokasi tidak terlalu jauh dan aman bagi pengendara motor. Cocok bagi yang suka foto-foto
english_translation: Nice, cool, and green place. The location is not too far and safe for motorcycle riders. Suitable for those who like taking photos.

text: Tempat berkemah yang direkomendasikan dengan berbagai aktivitas luar ruangan lainnya yang dapat dilakukan keluarga.
english_translation: Recommended campsite with various other outdoor activities for families.

text: Sungguh tempat yang indah untuk melacak dan menikmati pemandangan .. dari perkebunan teh hingga hutan kayu pinus ..
english_translation: Truly a beautiful place to track and enjoy the scenery.. from tea plantations to pine forests..

text:
Tempat bagus dan nyaman dan jg luas untuk yang ingin bermain,
Dan jg banyak spot" foto untuk yang ingin berselfie ria,
english_translation:
A nice and comfortable place, also spacious for those who want to play,
And also many photo spots for those who want to take selfies.

text: Sangat sejuk dan indah..tetapi jalan setapak agak licin ketika setelah hujan..dan terus menanjak sejak awal perjalanan
english_translation: Very cool and beautiful.. but the path is a bit slippery after the rain.. and it continues uphill from the start of the journey.

text:
Tempat Nyaman, bersih, cocok untuk keluarga / rombongan besar .
Aman untuk anak-anak selagi dalam pengawasan orangtua.
english_translation:
Comfortable place, clean, suitable for families / large groups.
Safe for children as long as they are supervised by parents.

text: Luar biasaaa.. Karyawan nya bisa bantuin ambilin foto2 keren sayang bgt coloseum sa jembatan nya blm boleh di kunjungi
english_translation: Amazinggg.. The staff can help take cool photos, it's a shame the Colosseum and the bridge aren't allowed to be visited yet.

text: Tempat untuk bermain bersama keluarga karna di sana ada penangkalan rusa jadi bisa sambil ngasih makan rusa dengan anak
english_translation: A place to play with family because there are deer there, so you can feed the deer with your children.

text: Perjuangan banget yah , jalannya luar biasa berbatu, tapi worth lah , sampe atas view nya... Hijaaauuu... Sukaaaa.. 😊 …
english_translation: It's a real struggle, the road is incredibly rocky, but it's worth it, the view from the top... Greennnn... Love it.. 😊

text: Tempatnya sejuk penuh warna warni bunga...bisa buat yg sedang mencari udara segar & sejenak melupakan hiruk pikuk  kota
english_translation: The place is cool, full of colorful flowers... it's good for those looking for fresh air & to forget the hustle and bustle of the city for a while.

text: Tempat yang mengasyikan untuk liburan bersama keluarga, terutama anak2 akan sangat menikmati fasilitas yang ada di sini
english_translation: A fun place for a family vacation, especially the children will really enjoy the facilities here.

text: Sebuah kompleks dengan banyak kafe/resto bertema, bukan tempat yang murah untuk bersantai jika anggaran Anda terbatas.
english_translation: A complex with many themed cafes/restaurants, not a cheap place to relax if you are on a budget.

text: Cocok berkunjung bersama keluarga, bunga dan buah bisa di beli, ada tempat makannya, bunganya lengkap, banyak spot foto
english_translation: Suitable to visit with family, flowers and fruits can be bought, there is a place to eat, the flowers are complete, many photo spots

text: Nyaman, asri, banyak wahana keluarga dan spot foto cantik. Mungkin BS ditambahkan menu makanan ringan/camilan yg murah.
english_translation: Comfortable, scenic, many family rides and beautiful photo spots. Perhaps cheap snacks/light meals could be added.

text: Lokasi wisata yang cocok untuk bersenang senang dengan siapapun, track jalan tidak terlalu sulit, pemandangan juga asik
english_translation: A tourist spot suitable for having fun with anyone, the walking path is not too difficult, and the scenery is also fun.

text: Mantaf dinginnya bisa 14° . Air terjunnya lumayan dingin track ke air terjun/ Curug Tilu asik menyusurin hutan di bawah
english_translation: The coolness is amazing, can reach 14°. The waterfall is quite cold, the track to the waterfall/Curug Tilu is fun, following the forest below.

text: Wisata alam yg menyenangkan, tp harus kuat lututnya jangan loyo, karena menuju curugnya lumayan jauh dr tempat parkiran
english_translation: A fun nature tour, but you have to have strong knees and not be weak, because it's quite a long walk to the waterfall from the parking lot.

text: seru bgt main di sini pegawainya juga ramah" tempatnya bersih nyaman bgt,buat harga c murah lah buat tempat sebagus ini
english_translation: So much fun playing here, the staff are also friendly. The place is very clean and comfortable. For the price, it's cheap for a place this good.

text: Bagus sekali curugnya. Saran untuk akses tangga Dan jalan setapak menuju curug malelanya diperbaiki.. agar lebih nyaman
english_translation: The waterfall is very beautiful. Suggestions for improving the access stairs and the path leading to the Malela waterfall... so that it is more comfortable.

text: Tempat rekreasi yang menarik, ikonnnya adalah kuliner apung, salah satu rekomendasi saya adalah kwetiau di perahu hijau
english_translation: An interesting recreational spot, its icon is floating culinary, one of my recommendations is kwetiau on the green boat

text: Capek banget untuk mencapai Curug, tempat wisata ini kurang perawatan padahal aset yg cukup potensial jika dikembangkan
english_translation: So tired to reach the waterfall, this tourist spot is lacking in maintenance, even though it's a quite potential asset if developed.

text: Cocok banget buat anak2, apalagi kalo weekday bisa leluasan berpoto, banyak banget spot poto keren, harga tiket murah..
english_translation: Perfect for kids, especially on weekdays when you can take lots of photos without crowds. There are so many cool photo spots, and the ticket price is cheap.

text: lebih enak dibandingkan dulu. cuma orang yg jualan sebaiknya ditertibkan. so far lebih ok dibanding beberapa tahun lalu
english_translation: It tastes better than before. It's just that the sellers should be regulated. So far, it's better than a few years ago.

text: Mantap buat camp ceria atau bersama keluarga, disarankan kalo mau kemping bawa sleeping bag dan pake tenda double layer
english_translation: Great for a fun camp or with family, it's recommended to bring a sleeping bag and use a double-layer tent if you plan to camp.

text: Suasananya nyaman, ada musik band yg menemani para pengunjung pd saat bersantai bersama klrga, bnyk spot foto yg bagus2
english_translation: The atmosphere is comfortable, there's live band music accompanying the visitors as they relax with family, many good photo spots.

text: Spot selfie banyak, viewnya baguuuuus sekali, harga cenderamata dan makanan murah, pedagang dan petugas wisata ramah...
english_translation: Lots of selfie spots, the view is very beautiful, souvenirs and food prices are cheap, the vendors and tour guides are friendly...

text: Kalian harus datang ke sini, ini akan berkemah, arung jeram. Fasilitas dengan fasilitas toilet umum Snack bar, mushola
english_translation: You guys have to come here, it will be camping, whitewater rafting. Facilities with public toilet facilities, snack bar, prayer room.

text: Tempat buat kabur dari rutinitas yang menyebalkan di perkotaan. Hutan pinus yang masih asri di kaki Gn Tangkuban Perahu
english_translation: A place to escape the annoying urban routine. A pristine pine forest at the foot of Mount Tangkuban Perahu.

text: Suasana sejuk,tempatnya bersih,fasilitas lengkap cuma jln menuju lokasi nya rusak.mudah"an kedepan nya bisa diperbaiki.
english_translation: The atmosphere is cool, the place is clean, the facilities are complete, only the road to the location is damaged. Hopefully, it can be repaired in the future.

text: Tempatnya bagus Curug Tinggi, cuman kuatin niat buat jalan aje hehehe, tapi pasti ga bakal nyesel dah kalau udah kesini
english_translation: The place is nice, Curug Tinggi, you just need to strengthen your resolve to walk a bit hehehe, but you definitely won't regret it when you get here.

text:
Pemandangan alamnya bagus,
Sungainya masih cukup bersih,
Bagus buat outbond/fismen,
Tapi sayang permainannya terbatas..
english_translation:
The natural scenery is beautiful,
The river is still quite clean,
Good for outbound/fishing,
But unfortunately the games are limited..

text: Tempat wisata santai, foto, dan kuliner yg warungnya terapung, belinya palai coin yg ditukarkan 5rb 10rb 20rb. 23juli22
english_translation: Relaxing tourist spot, photos, and culinary experiences with floating stalls, purchased with coins exchanged for 5k, 10k, 20k. 23July22

text:
1 pesan buat PENGUNJUNG yang Terhormat..
BAWA PULANG SAMPAH yang anda bawa..

Alhamdulillah.. paling pas buat Healing..
english_translation:
1 message for our Dear Visitors..
PLEASE TAKE YOUR TRASH HOME..

Alhamdulillah.. perfect for Healing..

text:
Tempatnya asik, asri, adem, seger banget
Cuma sayang di Transitnya kamar mandi ga dipisah sama WC jd lama banget ntrinya
english_translation:
The place is cool, beautiful, and very refreshing.
It's just a shame that in the Transit, the bathroom isn't separated from the toilet, so the wait is very long.

text: Cape dijalan nya aja ya guys harus naik turun gunung tp kebayar tuntas lunas dah kalo udah sampe mah karna indah bangett
english_translation: It's on the way, guys, you have to go up and down mountains, but it's totally worth it once you get there because it's so beautiful.

text: Sangat bagus untuk tempat bersantai dgn keluarga sambil menikmati suasana alam pegunungan dan melihat koleksi anggreknya
english_translation: Very good for a place to relax with family while enjoying the mountain nature and seeing the orchid collection.

text: Untuk hiking enak pisan..bisa ke tebing lumut liat benteng peninggalan perang pokona asal pake gauide bisa lihat semua..
english_translation: For hiking, it's really great. You can go to the mossy cliffs to see relics of war fortifications. Basically, as long as you use a guide, you can see everything.

text: Terkesan sama kombinasi antara wisata outbond dan pnginapan di perbukitan yang masih asri plus restouran dan tmpat oleh2
english_translation: Impressed by the combination of outdoor activities and lodging in the still-natural hills, plus a restaurant and souvenir shop.

text:
Penataannya jauh lebih baik dibanding terakhir kesini di 1998..

Selalu menarik untuk menikmati keindahan kawah disini..
english_translation:
The arrangement is much better compared to my last visit here in 1998..

It's always interesting to enjoy the beauty of the crater here..

text: Tempatnya bagus banget, lahan parkir luas, kamar mandi aman, kece pokoknya cocok buat camping bareng keluarga atau teman
english_translation: The place is really great, with a spacious parking lot, secure bathrooms, it's cool and perfect for camping with family or friends.

text: Permainannya cukup banyak, ada kereta wara wiri, perahu, sepeda, scooter listrik, naik kuda, juga ada resto/cafe disini.
english_translation: The games are quite a lot, there are trams going back and forth, boats, bicycles, electric scooters, horseback riding, and there are also restaurants/cafes here.

text:
Salah satu destinasi recomended di lembang, cuma untuk tiketnya lumayan hehe..
1 motor berdua 60k udh termasuk parkir ..
english_translation:
One of the recommended destinations in Lembang, although the ticket price is quite high hehe..
1 motorbike for two is 60k, already including parking..

text: tempat yang seru buat wisata.. ada flyong fox dn trekking line. dianjurkan bawa jas hujan karena sering hujan sore hari.
english_translation: A fun place for a tour... there's a flying fox and trekking line. It's recommended to bring a raincoat because it often rains in the afternoon.

text: Sangat menyenangkan, cocok buat liburan keluarga disaat akhir pekan. Tiket masuk dn aneka jajanan jg lumayan terjangkau.
english_translation: Very enjoyable, suitable for a family holiday on the weekend. Entrance tickets and various snacks are also quite affordable.

text: Sudah tidak diragukan lagi merupakan wisata yg wajib dikunjungi. Ada salah satu cerita rakyat indonesia yg sdh tersohor.
english_translation: It is undoubtedly a must-visit tourist destination. There is a famous Indonesian folk tale.

text: Tempat yg indah dan seru buat liburan bareng keluarga tercinta, apalagi anak2 pasti seneng bgt tiap diajak kesini 😍🥰❤️ …
english_translation: A beautiful and exciting place for a vacation with loved ones, especially kids will be so happy every time they are taken here 😍🥰❤️ …

text:
Jalur trek hiking bagus, lumayan. Cuma kurang sign, kasih lah sign di setiap persimpangan.
Itu akan memudahkan siapapun.
english_translation:
The hiking trail is good, decent. Just lacking signs, please put signs at every intersection.
That would make it easier for anyone.

text: Tempatnya bagus, tp sayang banyak sampah. akses menuju kesana jalannya masih jelek, aplg kalau habis hujan tambah licin.
english_translation: The place is nice, but unfortunately there's a lot of trash. The road to get there is still bad, and it gets even more slippery after it rains.

text: Itu dihias dengan baik dan bangunannya tidak tipis. Ada banyak yang bisa difoto, dan Anda hanya perlu berjalan-jalan.
english_translation: It is well-decorated and the building is not flimsy. There are many photo opportunities, and you just need to walk around.

text: Menyenangkan sekaliiiii, banyak makanan, permainan dan pemandangan yang indah cocok untuk selfi maupun rekreasi keluarga
english_translation: So much funnnnn, lots of food, games, and beautiful scenery, perfect for selfies or family recreation.

text: Gak bakal rugi memasuki tempat ini, karena tiket masuk diganti dengan makanan. Bisa ambil gambar sesuka hati. Bagus bgt.
english_translation: You won't regret entering this place, because the entrance fee is replaced with food. You can take pictures as much as you like. Really good.

text: Google maps selalu membantu dikala susah maupun ketika mencari tempat recommendasian terimakasih and thanks stone garden
english_translation: Google Maps always helps when in need or when looking for recommended places, thank you and thanks Stone Garden.

text: Tempat wisata baru,,mudah terjangkau,,parkiran luas,,belum terlalu lengkap tapi lumayan buat liburan bersama keluarga...
english_translation: New tourist spot, easy to reach, spacious parking, not yet too complete but decent for a family vacation...

text: Tempat liburan asik keluarga dengan pemandangan alam nya yg memanjakan mata, enak buat relaksasi otak dari penat kerjaan
english_translation: A cool family vacation spot with breathtaking natural scenery, perfect for relaxing your mind from the fatigue of work.

text: Luas, bs camping dan nginap di bungalow, banyak spot utk anak2, sayangnya sangat ramai krn banyak family gathering besar
english_translation: Spacious, can camp and stay in a bungalow, many spots for kids, unfortunately very crowded due to many large family gatherings.

text: Sejak jadi tempat wisata, Akses nya jadi lebih gampang, walaupun harus membayar 10rb, ada byk spot foto yg Instagramable
english_translation: Since becoming a tourist spot, access has become easier, even though you have to pay 10 thousand, there are many Instagrammable photo spots.

text: Gunung Putri bisa menjadi salah satu destinasi menikmati hari yang sejuk oleh rindangnya pohon dan asrinya Kota Lembang.
english_translation: Gunung Putri can be one of the destinations to enjoy a cool day amidst the shade of trees and the natural beauty of Lembang City.

text: Bagus sih pelayanannya dan ini masih satu kawasan dengan d'dieuland sama dago bakery juga, cuman sarae heelsnya di bawah
english_translation: The service is good and it's still in the same area as d'dieuland and dago bakery too, but I suggest the heels are lower

text: Tempatnya msh alami. Jalanannya masih jalan setapak. Tapi treknya luar biasa menguras tenaga. Hanya khusus yg kuat jalan
english_translation: The place is still natural. The path is still a walking trail. But the trek is incredibly draining. Only for those who are strong walkers.

text:
Dari cikole lembang tidak terlalu jauh.
Baiknya pagi-pagi kalo dateng kesini supaya masih sepi, krna kalo siangan penuh.
english_translation: From Cikole Lembang, it's not too far. It's best to come here in the morning so it's still quiet, because later in the day it gets crowded.

text: Pemandangannya bagus tapi menurut saya wahana permainan untuk anak2 nya kurang di tambah areanya harus lebih safety Lagi
english_translation: The view is good, but I think the children's rides are lacking and the area needs to be safer.

text: Tempatnya bagus, banyak sekali berbagai macam bunga, banyak juga spot foto yang bagus, fasilitas ada toilet dan mushola.
english_translation: The place is nice, with a wide variety of flowers, many good photo spots, and facilities include a toilet and prayer room.

text:
Harga tiket terjangkau
Tempatnya bagus,dan menarik
Ada staff2 yg bisa membantu foto dan hasilnya bagus,gratis
Recomended
english_translation:
Affordable ticket prices
The place is good and interesting
There are staff who can help take photos and the results are good, free
Recommended

text: Cantik2 bunganya masyallah. Suka banget liatnya. Seger mata. Dan mereka juga jual benihnya jadi bisa dibawa pulang. 😀😀 …
english_translation: Beautiful flowers, mashallah. I really like looking at them. They refresh the eyes. And they also sell the seeds so you can take them home. 😀😀 …

text: Enak banget buat camp, tersedia listrik juga kalo mau cas , ada air terjun, kebun teh , kalau malam dingin bgttttttt 😄 …
english_translation: Super nice for camping, electricity is available if you want to charge, there's a waterfall, a tea plantation, and it's super cold at night 😄

text: Cocok buat healing tempat yang indah udara yang sejuk dan ini namanya Curug pelangi. Dengan harga yang sangat terjangkau
english_translation: Perfect for healing, a beautiful place with cool air and this is called Curug Pelangi. At a very affordable price.

text: tempat wisata alam yang ada d kabupaten bandung barat menyuguh kan pemandangan alam,banyak batu batuan kapur laut purba.
english_translation: The natural tourist attractions in West Bandung Regency offer natural scenery, with many ancient marine limestone rock formations.

text: Tiket 15 ribu per orang kalo pake tour guide bayar tour guide 200k. Jalan terjal untuk bisa naik ke curug.. sekitar 6km.
english_translation: 15 thousand tickets per person, if you use a tour guide, pay the tour guide 200k. Steep path to get to the waterfall... about 6km.

text: Tempat yang nyaman dan asik untuk dikunjungi,  banyak spot foto yang keren keren,  buat foto model ataupun foto keluarga
english_translation: A comfortable and fun place to visit, with many cool photo spots, for model shoots or family photos

text: Kesini karena nonton konser. Tp kayaknya buat wiken camping seru juga ini. Tempatnya menyenangkan, banyak spot foto haha
english_translation: Came here because of the concert. But it seems like it would be fun for a weekend camping trip too. The place is nice, lots of photo spots haha

text: Tempat sangat bagus, kalau bisa piara hewàn yg cocok dgn lingkungan tersebut, misalnya Burung², Angsa atau Bebek dsbnya.
english_translation: A very nice place, if it were possible to keep animals that are suitable for the environment there, for example birds, geese, or ducks, etc.

text: Kalau bawa makanan sebaiknya di masukin ke tas/ransel, karena ada monyet yg siap merebut makanan/minuman yg kita tenteng
english_translation: If you bring food, it's best to put it in a bag/backpack, because there are monkeys ready to snatch the food/drinks you're carrying.

text: Cocok untuk liburan keluarga.. yg mau merasakan suasana kemping dengan banyak fasilitas., siapin aja budget nya hehe....
english_translation: Suitable for a family vacation.. those who want to experience a camping atmosphere with many facilities, just prepare the budget hehe....

text: Tempatnya sejuk banyak spot foto , area istirahat juga banyak , klo mau dateng jangan pas high season bisa kejebak macet
english_translation: The place is cool with many photo spots, and there are also many resting areas. If you want to come, don't come during high season, you might get stuck in traffic.

text: Track nya bagus pemandangan nya sejuk di mata air curug nya pun bersih pisaandan perlu pembenahan lagi.... Semoga sukses
english_translation: The track is good, the scenery is cool on the eyes, the spring waterfall is also very clean and needs more improvement.... Hope it's successful.

text: Tempatnya asri...bebatuan zaman purba dan sangat keren tempatnya, salah satu destinasi pariwisata di bandung barat👍👍👍🙏🙏 …
english_translation: The place is beautiful... ancient rocks and a very cool place, one of the tourist destinations in West Bandung👍👍👍🙏🙏 …

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk berfoto dengan tema seperti eiffel, patung liberty, coloseum, sphynx dan jembatan gantung merah.
english_translation: A great place for photos with themes like the Eiffel Tower, Statue of Liberty, Colosseum, Sphinx, and the red suspension bridge.

text: Pemandangan  nya asyik suasana  nya cocok  untuk melihat sunrise ketika  pagi buta  atau matahari  tenggelam Oh..Now..!!!
english_translation: The view is nice, the atmosphere is suitable for watching the sunrise in the early morning or sunset. Oh.. Now..!!!

text: Tempat selalu upgrade jadi ga usah susah untuk mendaki, sebagian jalan sudah d aspal, ada permainan sebelum ke kawah ratu
english_translation: The place is always being upgraded, so there's no difficulty in hiking. Some roads are already paved, and there are games before reaching the queen's crater.

text: Kalau ngecamp di bukit ini, anda bisa melihat hamparan kota Lembang dan juga Bandung yang dikelilingi oleh gunung-gunung.
english_translation: If you camp on this hill, you can see the expanse of Lembang town and also Bandung surrounded by mountains.

text: Suasananya adem banget, banyak monyet pula..hhe🐒 sayangnya kemaren musim longsor dilarang turun ke tepi air terjunnya.. …
english_translation: The atmosphere is really cool, lots of monkeys too.. hehe 🐒 unfortunately yesterday was landslide season so we weren't allowed to go down to the waterfall edge.. …

text: kayak hutan rimba, turun ke lembahan, dingin mah udah pasti, kurang ngenikmatin acara jalan2 nih soalnya buru2 maennya..😣
english_translation: Jungle kayaking, down into the valley, cold is a given, I didn't enjoy the sightseeing as much because I was in a hurry to play.. 😣

text: Cocok untuk prewedding/wisata, setiap jam 8 pintu air di buka dan kuning diawal, momen seru saat air mulai mengalir deras
english_translation: Suitable for pre-wedding/tours, the sluice gate opens every hour at 8, and it's yellow at first, an exciting moment when the water starts flowing rapidly.

text:
Dulu kesini pas November 2015, waktu itu masih belum booming sprt skrg

Berikut dibawah potonya tahun 2015 bulan November
english_translation:
I came here back in November 2015, it wasn't as popular then as it is now.

Here are the photos from November 2015 below.

text: Tempat outbound yg menarik dengan banyak fasilitas disana, serta ada pula penginapan dengan nuasa alam dan camping ground
english_translation: An interesting outbound location with many facilities there, as well as accommodation with a natural ambiance and camping grounds.

text: Tebing nya keren dan juga di kelilingi pohon yang bikin adem. Recommended bangat buat nyantai disana apalagi di sore hari
english_translation: The cliffs are cool and also surrounded by trees that make it feel refreshing. Highly recommended for relaxing there, especially in the afternoon.

text: Tempatnya sejuk dan cocok untuk yang suka berpetualang di alam bebas, outbound nya lumayan menarik untuk memacu adrenalin
english_translation: The place is cool and suitable for those who like outdoor adventures, the outbound activities are quite exciting to get your adrenaline pumping.

text: Lumayan buat refreshing...., Untuk jalan ke air terjun lumayan jauh, tapi enak kanan kiri pohon, jadi capeknya gak kerasa
english_translation: It's nice for refreshment... The walk to the waterfall is quite far, but it's pleasant with trees on both sides, so you don't feel tired.

text: Tempat nya keren buat foto2.. Akses jalan cukup mudah, hanya hati2 kalo bawa makanan, bisa d serbu sama pasukan monyet :D
english_translation: The place is cool for taking photos.. The road access is quite easy, just be careful if you bring food, you might get swarmed by the monkey troops :D

text: Tempat yg cocok untuk melepaskan penat,lelah dan galau...cm masih kurang banyak spot dan kegiatan untuk d lihat d sini...
english_translation: A suitable place to relieve fatigue, tiredness, and anxiety... but there are still not enough spots and activities to see here...

text: Jarak dari tempat beli tiket ke tempat wisatanya lumaya jauh dan melelahkan karena melewati bukit dan aliran sungai kecil
english_translation: The distance from the ticket counter to the tourist attraction is quite far and tiring because it involves passing hills and small streams.

text: Selfie di alam bebas, top view nya, warga lokal ramah, ga banyak pungutan, akses kurang diekspos, jalan masuk masih jelek
english_translation: Selfie in nature, top view, friendly locals, not many fees, access not well-known, entrance road is still bad

text: tempat yang cukup nyaman untuk family gathering, wahana team game yang bervariasi, EO yang seru, sukses selalu Grafika 👍🏼
english_translation: A comfortable place for a family gathering, varied team game attractions, exciting EO, always successful Grafika 👍🏼

text: Datang pagi2 lihat matahari terbit. Pemandangannya bagus dan udara masih adem. Diatas jam 8 pagi sudah mulai tersa panas.
english_translation: Arrived early to watch the sunrise. The scenery was beautiful and the air was still cool. After 8 AM, it started to get hot.

text: Meski blm 100 % jadi semua tp tempat ini keren bnget, dari security bagian tiket driver wara wiri dan staf lainnya ramah2
english_translation: Even though it's not 100% finished yet, this place is really cool. From the security at the ticket counter to the drivers going back and forth, and the other staff, everyone is friendly.

text: Bagusss...untuk yg hobby spot2 foto selfie wifie...mantapp....sayang masih kurang penataannya...kulinernya juga kurang...
english_translation: Great... for those who love to find selfie spots... fantastic.... too bad the arrangement is still lacking... the culinary scene is also lacking...

text: Ada 2 aliran sungai yang menjadi satu di curug maribaya , andai sungai yang satunya lagi airnya bersih , akan lebih bagus
english_translation: There are 2 streams that merge at Maribaya waterfall; it would be even better if the water in the other stream was clean.

text: Bisa liat matahari terbit kalo pagi, cuma saya saran kan agar memakai masker , soalnya bau belerang nya lumayan kalo pagi
english_translation: You can see the sunrise in the morning, but I recommend wearing a mask because the sulfur smell is quite strong in the morning.

text: Tempat nya asik, adem, sejuk, alami, fasilitas juga oke tinggal akses jalan nya aja agar bisa di perbaiki biar lebih joss
english_translation: The place is nice, cool, fresh, natural, and the facilities are also okay. Only the road access needs to be improved to make it even better.

text:
Bagus,,,,,udaranya sejuk dan nuansa alam yang msh alami.Naik offroad landrover nya jg menantang adrenalin.
Pokok nya puas
english_translation: Good, the air is cool and the natural atmosphere is still pristine. Riding the Land Rover off-road also challenges the adrenaline. Overall, satisfied.

text: Bagus, terjangkau dan banyak bunganya. Tertata rapi. Mungkin dibuat lebih luas lagi supaya makin banyak koleksi bunganya.
english_translation: Good, affordable, and lots of flowers. Well-organized. Perhaps it could be made even larger to accommodate more flower collections.

text: Waktu kesini pas ramadhan, ngabuburit di orchid seru juga. Sepi, jadi leluasa bergaya. Ahahahahaa. Sweet memories, SERUUU
english_translation: I came here during Ramadan, and "ngabuburit" (spending the time before breaking fast) at Orchid was also fun. It was quiet, so I could pose freely. Ahahahahaa. Sweet memories, FUNNNN

text: Tempat nya bagus bgt.  Sederhana tp spot foto ny bejibun.  Mantapp poko ny.  Htm murah bgt..  2 hari yg lalu 10ribu/orang
english_translation: The place is really nice. Simple, but so many photo spots. Awesome, that's all. The entrance fee is very cheap. 2 days ago it was 10 thousand per person.

text: Tempat wisata yang sangat jelek! Tidak diurus! Banyak sampah! Dan tidak indah! Mohon diperhatikan kembali pengelolaannya!
english_translation: A very ugly tourist spot! Neglected! Lots of garbage! And not beautiful! Please reconsider its management!

text: Karcis masuk murah 10rb per orang. Tata bunga yang rapi dan elok di mata. Asik sama keluarga atau pasangan kalau ke sini.
english_translation: Entrance ticket is cheap, 10,000 rupiah per person. The flower arrangements are neat and pleasing to the eye. Fun with family or a partner if you come here.

text: Tempatnya cakep bgt dooong ... Adem .... Ada live music juga .... Banyak spot foto lucu lucu... Banyak jajanan gemes juga
english_translation: The place is really nice... Cool... There's live music too.... Lots of cute photo spots... Lots of adorable snacks too.

text: Pas dateng masih sepi karena dateng pagi2 😁 adem banget tempat nya,, tempatnya bersih,, pokoknya recomended deh pkoknya 😊
english_translation: It was still quiet when I arrived because I came early 😁 The place is really cool,, the place is clean,, overall, it's recommended, definitely 😊

text: Tempat nya cocok banget buat healing, tiket juga murah 8k aja dan parkir 2k ada mushola juga toilet. Cocok untuk keluarga
english_translation: The place is perfect for healing, tickets are also cheap at only 8k and parking is 2k, there's also a prayer room and toilet. Suitable for families.

text: Baru kesampean ke sini, setelah sebelum nya salah lokasi 😅, perjalanan kurang lebih 40 menit ada 3 curug di sekitar nya, …
english_translation: Finally managed to get here, after getting lost the previous time 😅, the journey was about 40 minutes and there are 3 waterfalls in the vicinity, …

text: Kalo blm hafal medan mending ajak warlok untuk ngeguide, lumayan tracknya naik turun nyebrangnya jmbatan yg udh bolong2...
english_translation: If you don't know the terrain well yet, it's better to ask locals for a guide. The track is quite up and down, crossing bridges that are already full of holes...

text: Pemandangan nya bagus,, sayang nya banyak sampah 😫 tolong yang berkunjung kesini untuk bisa lebih menjaga jangan nyampah …
english_translation: The view is nice, unfortunately there's a lot of trash 😫 please those who visit here, can you be more mindful and not litter...

text: Bagus Bukit Smile tempatnya asik Untuk camping cocok banget buat keluarga atau rombongan Apa lagi anak-anak pasti suka.
english_translation: Bagus Bukit Smile is a great place, very fun. Perfect for camping, great for families or groups. Kids will especially love it.

text: Lokasi rekreasi yg aman nyaman sejuk.. TOP BGT daah.. Suka akYu.. Dari pengunjung anak2 sampai lansia terhibur😍🥰😘 mantuL …
english_translation: A safe, comfortable, and cool recreational location.. Really TOP.. I love it.. From children to the elderly, everyone is entertained 😍🥰😘 Truly amazing…

text: Sesuai namanya.. tanamannya begonia semua mayoritas. Harga relatif terjangkau 15k/org. Anak usia 2th mulai dikenakan tiket
english_translation: As its name suggests, the plants are predominantly begonias. The price is relatively affordable at 15k/person. Children aged 2 years and above are charged an entrance fee.

text: Pemandangan yang bagus, nyaman dan bersih tempatnya.. Untuk berwisata sangat di rekomendasikan, kemudahan dalam berwisata.
english_translation: Great view, comfortable and clean place.. Highly recommended for traveling, ease of travel.

text: Tmpt bagus cocok untuk keliling bersantai menikmati situ dan udara sejuk bnyk tmpt makan .bisa naik perahu 20rb perorang .
english_translation: Nice place, suitable for walking around and relaxing, enjoying the lake and cool air, many food places. Can take a boat for 20,000 per person.

text: Kerennn, wajib di coba, bisa hamokan, klw mau puas jgn pas sabtu minggu biar ga antri, bapak yg Jasa hammock ny juga ramah
english_translation: Awesome, a must-try. You can hammock. If you want to be satisfied, don't come on Saturdays or Sundays so you don't have to queue. The guy who provides the hammock service is also friendly.

text: tempatnya bagus cocok untuk foto foto saran saya cobain naik jembatannya bagus bgt plus dpt pasport buat kenang kenangann!
english_translation: The place is nice and perfect for photos. My suggestion is to try crossing the bridge, it's really good plus you get a passport as a souvenir!

text: Segala penat lelah nuntun dan manggul sepeda terbayar lunas serelah sampai dan terjun langsung ke air danau yang segar 😀 …
english_translation: All the exhaustion from pushing and carrying the bicycle was completely paid off after arriving and diving straight into the fresh lake water 😀

text: Tempat nya sejuk,enak juga buat refresing dan buat permainan nya seru cocok banget buat yang healing,ataupun ngadain acara
english_translation: The place is cool, also good for refreshing and the games are exciting, very suitable for those who want to heal or hold an event.

text: Yg mau kesini cari d google maps saung kondang ya ati2 jangan curug halimun. Klo di gmpas curuh halimun jalannya jauh bgt!
english_translation: If you want to come here, search for "Saung Kondang" on Google Maps. Be careful not to go to "Curug Halimun." If you search for "Curug Halimun" on Maps, the road is very far!

text: Asik beesih tempatnya pemandangan mengesankan, hanya saja perlu permhatian akses jalan yg masih batu kapur belum beraspal.
english_translation: The place is cool and clean with an impressive view, but it needs attention regarding the access road which is still limestone and unpaved.

text: Disamping curug ada padang rumput cukup luas, sangat cocok untuk piknik bersama keluarga dan kerabat sambil melihat sungai
english_translation: Beside the waterfall, there is a fairly large meadow, very suitable for picnicking with family and relatives while watching the river.

text: Tempat mudah d jangkau. Sayang samapah berserakan karena kurang nya fasilitas untuk membuang sampah. Terlebih d curug tilu
english_translation: Easily accessible location. A shame about the scattered trash due to a lack of waste disposal facilities, especially at Curug Tilu.

text: Sangat indah dan menjadi pengalaman pertama juga ketika sekumpulan monyet keluar dari hutan dan berpindah ke hutan lainnya
english_translation: Very beautiful and it was also a first-time experience when a group of monkeys came out of the forest and moved to another forest.

text: Salah satu camping ground di lembang, dingin udah pasti. Ada spot buat liat sunset dan sunrise untuk para pemburu matahari
english_translation: One of the camping grounds in Lembang, it's definitely cold. There are spots to see the sunset and sunrise for sun chasers.

text: setiap ke Bandung selalu menyempatkan diri datang kesini, view nya sangat indah dan pengelolaannya selalu ada peningkatan.
english_translation: Every time I come to Bandung, I always make time to come here. The view is very beautiful and the management is always improving.

text: Tempat yang bagus buat ngecam dan menikmati keindahan alam, apalagi bisa menyaksikan sunrise/sunset yang begitu indah 🌲🍃 …
english_translation: A great place to chill and enjoy the beauty of nature, especially being able to witness such a beautiful sunrise/sunset 🌲🍃

text: Tempatnya masih cukup asri, tidak cukup banyak kekurangan hanya saja jalan menuju tujuannya (jalan aspal) tidak cukup baik
english_translation: The place is still quite natural, not many drawbacks, it's just that the road leading to the destination (the asphalt road) is not good enough.

text: Pemandangan alam yang indah. Untuk pengunjung, tolong jangan buang sampah di area wisata ya :) Be a smart tourist, please!
english_translation: Beautiful natural scenery. To visitors, please do not litter in the tourist area :) Be a smart tourist, please!

text: Tempat camping yg dekat dengan kota bandung.Udara sejuk banyak pepohonan Pinus. Cocok buat bikin hamock dan kemping ceria.
english_translation: Camping spot near Bandung city. Cool air, lots of pine trees. Suitable for setting up a hammock and cheerful camping.

text: Tempat yang sejuk untuk melepas kepenatan. Namun sayangnya, di puncak masih banyak terdapat lalat-lalat yang berterbangan.
english_translation: A cool place to unwind. However, unfortunately, there are still many flies buzzing around at the summit.

text: Tempatnya luas banget, banyak banget spot foto. Bisa seharian buat muterinnya. Ada beberapa spot berbayar. Worth it banget
english_translation: The place is really spacious, with so many photo spots. You could spend all day exploring it. There are a few paid spots. Totally worth it.

text: Udaranya sejuk dingin menyegarkan....kontur gk terlalu naik turun cocok buat anak2 jg. Spot foto jgn ditanya. Recommended.
english_translation: The air is cool, cold, and refreshing....the terrain isn't too hilly, so it's also suitable for children. Photo spots are a given. Recommended.

text:
Tempat nya bagus nyaman cocok  buat acara sekolah,keluarga...sungguh seru syuka syuka
#karyawisata
#SDN Pakuwon 1 Sumedang
english_translation:
The place is nice and comfortable, suitable for school events, family... really fun, love it love it
#fieldtrip
#SDN Pakuwon 1 Sumedang

text: Tempatnya enak, jalan menuju keatas bisa menggunakan motor maupun mobil pribadi, hanya saja jika bus harus sewa mobil lagi
english_translation: The place is nice. You can go uphill by motorcycle or private car, but if it's a bus, you have to rent another car.

text: Tempatnya sejuk banget, villanya jga keren bnget service pelayanannya sangat memuaskan, pokonya wisata alamnya kece banget
english_translation: The place is really cool, the villa is also very cool, the service is very satisfying, the nature tourism is really awesome

text: Warna airnya coklat, tidak terlalu beruntung. Jangan berkunjung setelah hari hujan. Trekking yang menantang tapi sepadan!
english_translation: The water color is brown, not too lucky. Don't visit after a rainy day. Challenging but rewarding trekking!

text: Suasananya menyenangkan, tempat wisata alam murah meriah buat keluarga, tiket masuk 10rb/orang sudah dapat ditukar minuman
english_translation: The atmosphere is pleasant, a budget-friendly natural attraction for families, the entrance ticket of 10,000 IDR per person can be exchanged for a drink.

text:
Dingin luar biasa malam hari dsini, ampe 14•.. Tapi tempatnya enak.
Sukses buat acara mx day 3 kemaren.
17-18 agustus 2019
english_translation:
It's incredibly cold here at night, down to 14 degrees.. But the place is nice.
Good luck with the MX Day 3 event yesterday.
August 17-18, 2019

text: Keren abis tempatnya, memang jalan masuk blm aspal dan masih bebatuan, tp semua terbayarkan dgn pemandangan yg luar biasa.
english_translation: Amazing place, the entrance road is not asphalted yet and is still rocky, but it's all worth it with the extraordinary view.

text: Bisa melihat keindahan alam di lokasi yang menjadi legenda Sangkuriang dan Dayang Sumbi. Terdapat 3 kawah yang masih aktif
english_translation: You can see the natural beauty at the location that became the legend of Sangkuriang and Dayang Sumbi. There are 3 active craters.

text: Tempat camp ceria yg recommended bgt untuk sunrise nya paling top kalo beruntung bisa liat awan dekat bgt dari tugu puncak
english_translation: A cheerful camping spot that's highly recommended for its top-notch sunrise. If you're lucky, you can see the clouds very close from the summit monument.

text: Dikunjungi hari ini, 9 Agustus 2018. Air terjun tidak ditemukan. Ini air terjun kering. Tidak banyak yang bisa dilihat :(
english_translation: Visited today, August 9, 2018. Waterfall not found. It's a dry waterfall. Not much to see :(

text: Mengunjungi untuk sementara ketika sudah ditutup dan saya terkesan dengan kemudahan untuk lebih dekat ke air terjun kecil
english_translation: Visited temporarily when it was closed and I was impressed with the ease of getting closer to the small waterfall

text: Tempat nya bagus sambil membayangkan sebelum ada bendungan saguling 2 air itu yang menyusuri sungai ternyata sangat tinggi
english_translation: The place is nice, imagining before the Saguling 2 dam, the water flowing down the river was very high.

text: Walau hutannya tidak selebat dulu, Jayagiri tetap jadi tempat alternatif di kota Bandung untuk  yang suka jalan atau lari.
english_translation: Even though the forest is not as dense as it used to be, Jayagiri remains an alternative spot in Bandung city for those who like to walk or run.

text: Recomend buat santai",,enak tempatnya,,sekedar saran kalau mau kesini enaknya jam 3 an ke atas biar teduh dan cuaca bagus,,
english_translation: Recommendation for relaxation",,the place is nice,,just a suggestion if you want to come here, it's best to come after 3 PM so it's shaded and the weather is good,,

text: tambah rame setelah pandemi.. agak susah dapet duduk di floating market, tp banyak pilihan makanan dan wahana baru yg asik.
english_translation: It's more crowded after the pandemic. It's a bit difficult to get a seat at the floating market, but there are many food choices and fun new rides.

text:
Masih perlu banyak pembenahan dan lokasi sempit.
Dengan tiket sedemikian rupa lebih nyaman jika digunakan untuk wahana lain
english_translation: Still needs a lot of improvements and the location is cramped. With tickets like that, it would be more comfortable to use for other attractions.

text: Tempatnya bersih terawat. Datang pas weekdays jadi ga rame, bisa nikmatin buat makan sama foto2 tanpa banyak keganggu orang
english_translation: The place is clean and well-maintained. Came on a weekday so it wasn't crowded, I could enjoy eating and taking photos without much disturbance from people.

text:
Pemandangannya indah.
Tp,  di sekitar sana ada pembakaran sampah plastik.  asap hitam itu sangat membahayakan  orang orang.
english_translation:
The view is beautiful.
But, around there, plastic is being burned. That black smoke is very dangerous for people.

text: Curug Halimun, Curug yg kata a 4-5 bulan lagi viral🎉 sepeda lipat pertama yg tembus Curug Halimun saguling 🍩💯 jejak gowes …
english_translation: Curug Halimun, a waterfall that will go viral in 4-5 months 🎉 the first foldable bike to reach Curug Halimun Saguling 🍩💯 cycling trail …

text: Kurang rekomended banget.masuk sih oke murah.cuman harga yg lainnya lebih mahal dan biasa aja..kalo buat tempat sih lumayan
english_translation: Highly not recommended. Getting in is okay and cheap. But the prices for other things are more expensive and just average. As for the place, it's alright.

text:
Butuh perjuangan pingin sampek sana
Tapi pas nyampek ke bawah kebayar capeknya semua dengan pemandangan yg luar biasa 😍😍😍 …
english_translation: It took effort to get there, but when I reached the bottom, all the tiredness was paid off by the extraordinary view 😍😍😍…

text: Duuuh tempat terdingin sepanjang hidup, dingiiiin banget, tapi suka sama suasananya, pertama kali nya naik flying fox wooow
english_translation: Duuuh, the coldest place of my life, sooooo cold, but I like the atmosphere, my first time doing a flying fox, wooow

text: Tempatnya sekarang makin keren, ada taman bunga rainbow, ada kota mini, lebih banyak spot fotonya, jadi gak bikin bosen 👍 …
english_translation: The place is getting cooler now, there's a rainbow flower garden, a mini city, more photo spots, so it's not boring 👍

text: orchid forest sangat bagus sekali, indahnya pemandangan, membuat saya kurang puas, mungkin suatu saat nanti mau kesana lagi
english_translation: The orchid forest is very, very good. The scenery is beautiful, it left me wanting more. Maybe I'll go back there again someday.

text: Entah kenapa namanya bukit senyum, tetapi pemandangan dari tempat ini memang membuat orang tersenyum karena keindahannya...
english_translation: For some reason it's called Smile Hill, but the view from this place truly makes people smile because of its beauty...

text: Tempat ny sejuk,adem,agak jauh dari kota bandung,wahana nya sii belum banyak karena masih baru dan masih proses pembangunan
english_translation: The place is cool and pleasant, a bit far from Bandung city. The attractions aren't many yet because it's new and still under construction.

text: Tempatnya oke, tiket masuk terjangkau. Cuma wahana nya memang belum 100 persen jadi/maksimal. Datang pas weekday jadi sepi.
english_translation: The place is okay, the entrance ticket is affordable. It's just that the rides aren't 100 percent ready/optimized yet. Came on a weekday so it was quiet.

text: Viewnya bagus karena di bawah Obwis Cikole, hutan pinus, temperatur dingin, ada fasilitas utk out-bond, tempat parkir luas.
english_translation: The view is good because it's below Obwis Cikole, pine forest, cold temperature, has facilities for outbound, ample parking.

text: Sebelum viral tempat ini sangat bagus, tapi setelah banyak yang datang dan kurang peduli pada lingkungan jadi kurang bagus.
english_translation: Before it went viral, this place was great, but after many people came and cared less about the environment, it became less good.

text: tempatnya keren walaupun agak pricey ya, masuk ke sarae hills 50k, naik jembatannya 15k, tapi worth it sama view nya keren,
english_translation: The place is cool even though it's a bit pricey, entering Sarae Hills is 50k, crossing the bridge is 15k, but it's worth it for the cool view.

text: Tempat wisatanya bagus,  sayang penjaga sewanya jutek. Tlg diedukasi lagi sama pemiliknya, bagaimana cara melayani costumer
english_translation: The tourist spot is nice, too bad the rental attendant is grumpy. Please be re-educated by the owner on how to serve customers.

text: TWA. G. Tangkuban Parahu lebih apik sekarang. Setelah lebih dari 10 tahun baru kesini lagi, banyak perubahan yg lebih baik.
english_translation: TWA. Mount Tangkuban Parahu is much better now. After more than 10 years, I've been here again, and there have been many positive changes.

text: Tempat bagus banget buat spot foto indah asri and banyak jenis bunganya and karanganya ..recomended banget buat pre weeding
english_translation: A really good place for beautiful and natural photo spots, with many types of flowers and corals. Highly recommended for pre-wedding photos.

text: Sayang kesana pas hujan, makanan termasuk mahal karena minimal 10rbu. Minum pun ga ada yg 5rbu. Tapi tahu gejrotnya enaaak.
english_translation: Too bad I went there when it was raining, the food was quite expensive because it was at least 10k. Even drinks weren't 5k. But the tahu gejrot was delicious.

text: Tempat bagus dan taman tertata dengan rapi, berkunjung saat sepi (bulan puasa) sangat puas. Untuk tempat foto tidak crowded
english_translation: A nice place with a well-maintained garden, visiting during a quiet time (during Ramadan) was very satisfying. The photo spots were not crowded.

text: Untuk fasilitas toilet harusnya bisa lebih banyak, toilet di parkiran basement cuma ada 1 itupun yg ngantri buanyak banget.
english_translation: For the toilet facilities, there should be more. The toilet in the basement parking lot is only one, and there's a huge queue for it.

text: Lumayan,dari dulu sampai sekarang ada peningkatan,renovasi fasilitas,cuman jalan menuju cic nya tolong segera diperbaiki😁 …
english_translation: Decent, from the past until now there's been an improvement, facility renovation, but please fix the road leading to the CIC soon 😁 …

text: Spot2nya sedikit dan berbayar, yang banyak para pedagang makanan , kurang luas lokasinya, banyak binatang yg kurang terawat
english_translation: The parking spots are few and paid, which is difficult for many food vendors. The location is not spacious, and there are many poorly maintained animals.

text:
Kesempatan yg sangat berhrga bs mengunjungi tangkuban perahu.. Udarany yg sangat sejuk
Dan keindahan kaawahny wooow top bgt
english_translation: A very valuable opportunity to visit Tangkuban Perahu. The air is very cool and the beauty of the crater is wow, top-notch.

text: Sarana rekreasi alam terbuka dgn pemandangan air terjun yang indah . Lokasi tepatnya di kecamatan cisarua kab bandung barat
english_translation: Outdoor recreational facility with beautiful waterfall views. The exact location is in Cisarua sub-district, West Bandung Regency.

text: Kalau mau kesini, pastikan kondisi fisik sedang fit karena perjalanan lumayan jauh. Jika sedang musim hujan, airnya coklat.
english_translation: If you want to come here, make sure you are in good physical condition as the journey is quite long. If it's the rainy season, the water will be brown.

text: Mantaap wisata alam peninggalan aliran sungai citarum kuno.. Tkp pertama sangkuriang bikin danau & perahu buat dayang sumbi
english_translation: Awesome natural attraction left by the ancient Citarum river flow.. The first scene is Sangkuriang making a lake & a boat for Dayang Sumbi

text: Mudah dijangkau, city light oke, dari parkir nanjak cocok buat latihan nanjak, sayang musholla rusak dan berisik bingits...
english_translation: Easily accessible, good city lights, uphill from parking, suitable for uphill training. Too bad the prayer room is damaged and very noisy...

text: Kalo kesini pas beruntung cerah banget kalo pas kurang nanti kabut. Tapi kalo mau cari suasana yg dingin dingin cocok hihiw
english_translation: If you come here when you're lucky, it's very bright, but if you're not, it'll be foggy. But if you're looking for a cool atmosphere, it's perfect, hihiw

text:
Masuknya bayr 30rb/org parkir 10rb flat.
Di dalam banyak wahana edukasi tpi kudu bayar2 lagi, jdi cukup mahal klo ditotal2.
english_translation:
Entrance fee 30,000 IDR/person, parking 10,000 IDR flat.
Inside there are many educational attractions but you have to pay for them again, so it's quite expensive when you add it all up.

text: Suasana selalu menyenangkan dan lebih baik, banyak perubahan.. sampah juga minim sangat terawat cocok untuk wisata keluarga
english_translation: The atmosphere is always pleasant and better, lots of changes.. very minimal and well-maintained trash, suitable for family tourism.

text: Luaaasss, buanyaak spot tentuny, baguss, jajanan beli koin dl, harga terjangkau, kalau mau beli oleh2 kaos juga berkualitas
english_translation: Lots of places, certainly, good, snacks bought with coins first, affordable prices, if you want to buy T-shirt souvenirs, they are also good quality.

text: Tempatnya bagus bgt tp jalannya lewat anak tangga yang banyak jadi tidak rekomendasi kalau ga kuat lewat banyak anak tangga
english_translation: The place is very nice, but the road has many stairs, so it's not recommended if you can't handle many stairs.

text: Tempat nya bagus harga tiket masuk nya 24k, ( Saya ke sana nya hari minggu ) cuman butuh efford aja naik/turun tangga nya 🤙
english_translation: The place is nice, the entrance ticket price is 24k. (I went there on Sunday) It just takes some effort to go up/down the stairs 🤙

Perjalanan yg bnr" bikin Syahduu ,, dr Tempat parkir ke lokasi Curug ,,

text:
Tidak disarankan kesini pada saat hujan.

english_translation:
It is not recommended to go here when it rains.
Because the road to the waterfall is slippery and muddy, but there are motorcycle taxis that can take you to the waterfall.

english_translation: The place is very cool, it's perfect for those who need refreshing to calm their hearts and minds, it's also really nice here.

text: Kurang bagus. Hanya pemandangan hutan aja. Tapi ada satu lagi yang bagus dan ada permainannya tapi aga jauh dari tempat ini.

text: Tiket masuk 35rb, Untuk lihat pemandangan alam, makan ringan dan tmpt main (virtual reality, sepeda air, atv, serodotan ban)

text:
Tempat Wisata Alam paling seru, santai dan keren untuk meet up bareng kawan dan meeting atau sekedar hang out
👍🏻😉🤙🏻🤓🤘🏻🤓✊🏻😎 …

text:

english_translation: You'll feel comfortable here... the photo spots are great. Especially seeing the flower garden, it's really beautiful. Health protocols are being followed here.

text: Suasana alam Yang sejuk wahana untuk anak",dewasa Dan orang tua ada beserta fasilitas yang bagus cocok untuk keluarga berlibur
english_translation: A cool natural atmosphere, attractions for children, adults, and the elderly are available along with good facilities, suitable for family holidays.

text: Keren bangt pokonya,  tapi kolam renangnya terlalu terbuka 😥 semoga kedepannya ada kolam renang khusus untuk wanita. Makasih …
english_translation: Amazing, really, but the pool is too open 😥 I hope in the future there will be a special pool for women. Thanks…

text: Cocok buat foto selfie, walau gak seberapa luas tp taman tertata rapi dan terpelihara bagus. Sayang tempat parkir kurang luas.
english_translation: Suitable for taking selfies, although not very spacious, the garden is neatly arranged and well-maintained. Unfortunately, the parking lot is not very spacious.

text: Traveling dan perjalananya adalah cara mengenal Tuhan, alam sekitar, orang lain dan diri sendiri @TWAGTangkubanPerahu 06/01/22
english_translation: Travel and its journey are ways to know God, the surrounding nature, other people, and oneself @TWAGTangkubanPerahu 06/01/22

text: Suka tempatnya nyaman cocok buat foto bawa keluarga anak kecil, tiket masuk September 2020 , 20 k seorang. Cafenya juga nyaman
english_translation: The place is comfortable, suitable for taking photos, bringing family with small children. Entrance ticket September 2020, 20k per person. The cafe is also comfortable.

text: Tempatnya indah, tp sayang kemarin airnya lagi kering,, terus kurangnya stand kuliner, dan masih dlm tahap pembangunan saung..
english_translation: The place is beautiful, but unfortunately the water was dry yesterday, and there's a lack of food stalls, and the gazebos are still under construction.

text: Tempat yang adem dan nyaman, lokasinya luas, pasilitas nya lengkap dan banyak permainannya..cocok bawa keluarga ke tempat itu.
english_translation: A cool and comfortable place, its location is spacious, the facilities are complete and there are many games. Suitable for bringing the family to that place.

text: Allhamdulilah trcapai jg wisata ke gunung tangkuban.perahu lembang bandung moga slalu menjadi gunung.wisata yg indah dan.sejuk
english_translation: Allhamdulilah, finally managed to visit Mount Tangkuban Perahu in Lembang, Bandung. May it always be a beautiful and cool tourist mountain.

text: Tempatnya enak dan cocok untuk kegiatan kemping,kemcer,untuk org yg mau naik gunung tapi mls muncak lama berjam",ini solusinya
english_translation: The place is nice and suitable for camping, car camping, and for people who want to climb mountains but are lazy to summit for hours, this is the solution.

text: Curug yang Eksotis, se Eksotis nanjak nya. Cocok juga untuk yang suka Hiking dikarenakan jalan nanjak se nanjak gunung Everest.
english_translation: Exotic Waterfall, as exotic as the climb. Also suitable for those who like hiking because the uphill path is as steep as Mount Everest.

text: Adem banget sih ini tempatnya bagus untuk yg suka foto2 bisa ajak anak2 jalan2 kesini juga. Seger mata lihat bunga warna warni.
english_translation: This place is really cool, it's nice for those who like taking photos. You can also bring children for a walk here. It's refreshing to see colorful flowers.

text:
Kesini cuma main di aulanya saja untuk acara komunitas.
Lumayan luas bisa nampung ratusan orang.
Pintu masuk melalui kota mini.
english_translation:
Only came here to play in the hall for a community event.
It's quite spacious and can accommodate hundreds of people.
Entrance is through the mini-town.

text: Pertama kesana langsung pengen meweg😂 kuasa Tuhan emng sangat amat luar biasa, seperti di pertengahan,antara bumi dan langit👍 …
english_translation: The first time I went there, I immediately wanted to cry 😂 God's power is truly, truly extraordinary, like being in the middle, between earth and sky 👍

text: Cocok untuk camping keluarga, santai-santai, tidak susah air, cocok dipilih untuk kalian yang mau ke gunung tapi gamau kecapean
english_translation: Suitable for family camping, relaxing, not difficult with water, a good choice for those who want to go to the mountains but don't want to get too tired.

text: Asik tempatnya, enak sih kalo hari biasa jadi ga terlalu ramai dan bisa lebih murah, tapi perjuangan kesananya yaa lumayan laah
english_translation: The place is cool. It's nice if you go on a weekday, so it's not too crowded and can be cheaper, but the journey there is quite a struggle.

text: Tempat yg bagus yg bisa di kunjungi besama pasangan yg lagi hanimun, Dan ad tempat pemandian air panas, Dan fasilitas yg nyaman
english_translation: A great place to visit with honeymooners, and there's a hot spring bath and comfortable facilities.

text:
Pemandangannya bagus

Cuma Musholla nya yg kurang, kiblat nya menghadap kamar mandi dan satu tembok dgn kamar mandii uhhhhh 🥲 …
english_translation:
The view is good,

It's just that the Musholla (prayer room) is lacking, the kiblat (direction of prayer) faces the bathroom and is on the same wall as the bathroom, uhhhhh 🥲 …

text: Tempat yang lumayan enak untuk jalan, jujur saya senang dgn destinasi Curug disini ada 3-4 dan bagus dan track nya sejuk mantap
english_translation: A pretty good place to walk, honestly I'm happy with the waterfall destinations here, there are 3-4 and they are good and the track is cool, awesome

text: Sejuk banget udaranya, banyak spot foto menarik, ada live musicnya. Cocok banget untuk tracking and gathering..Mantap pokonya 😍
english_translation: The air is very cool, there are many interesting photo spots, and there's live music. Perfect for tracking and gatherings.. Awesome overall 😍

text:
Tempatnya sejuk, nyaman.
Pasilitas umum bersih.
Sayang jalan msh batu jadi harus sangat berhati-hati bagi yg membawa kendaraan.
english_translation:
The place is cool and comfortable.
The public facilities are clean.
It's a shame the road is still rocky, so you have to be very careful if you're bringing a vehicle.

text: pemandangan akan maksimal kalau datangnya di pagi atau sore sekalian,kalau siang2 panas bgt juga soalnya... htm masuk 18rb /org
english_translation: The view will be at its best if you come in the morning or late afternoon, because it's very hot in the middle of the day... Entrance fee is IDR 18,000 per person.

text: Tempat nyaman. Banyak curug pilihan. View nya ok. Pelayanan kurang ramah. Toilet dan mushola tidak terawat. Harga karcis murah.
english_translation: Comfortable place. Many waterfall options. The view is okay. Service is not very friendly. Toilet and prayer room are not well-maintained. Ticket price is cheap.

text: Pemandangannya okey bener. Lumayan perjalan ke sana nya.. di sana banyak warung dan ada sewaan tikar untuk tempat kita santai2.
english_translation: The view is really okay. The journey there is quite alright. There are many stalls there and they rent out mats for us to relax.

text:
View yg indah bawa keluarga, tempat bersih jalanan rapih. Masih pagi jd gak begitu macet.
Semoga lain waktu bisa kembali lagih.
english_translation:
Beautiful view, brought the family. The place is clean, the streets are tidy. It was still early so not too crowded.
Hope to return again another time.

text: Tempatnya enak Namun ternyata tidak seluas yang aku kira. tapi menurutku agak overprice sih dengan spot foto yang g gitu banyak
english_translation: The place is nice, but it turned out not to be as spacious as I thought. However, I think it's a bit overpriced with not that many photo spots.

text: Enak buat kumpul rame-rame, tempat luas wahana juga aman semua untuk permainan, bagus buat foto-foto, dan bersih pula tempatnya
english_translation: Great for gathering with a crowd, the spacious place has safe rides for all games. It's good for taking photos, and the place is also clean.

text: Tempat yang bagus untuk dikunjungi. Daerah ini bersih dan bagus. Hanya akses jalan mobil menuju gerbang yang perlu diperbaiki.
english_translation: A great place to visit. The area is clean and nice. Only the car access road to the gate needs improvement.

text: Cocok untuk wisuda keluarga banyak tempat utk berinteraksi dengan hewan dan alam. Sedangkan untuk wahana bermain kurang banyak.
english_translation: Suitable for family graduations with many places to interact with animals and nature. However, there are not many amusement rides.

text:
Kesini pas weekend ga serame yang dibayangkan.
Tiket masuk htm 50k, mau experience di wood bridge htm nya 20k free flying fox..
english_translation:
Came here on the weekend and it wasn't as crowded as I imagined.
Entrance ticket is 50k, the experience at the wood bridge is 20k with a free flying fox.

text: Tempat makan bersama di pinggir danau, beli coin dulu buat bayar, warung2 makan tutup jam 6 sore, masuk wahana harus bayar lagi
english_translation: Communal dining area by the lake, buy coins first to pay, food stalls close at 6 PM, must pay again to enter attractions.

text: Tempat nya cukup bagus buat foto foto, tp harus hati hati soalnya banyak monyet suka maling tas. Jd tas nya gabisa ditinggal :(
english_translation: The place is quite good for taking photos, but you have to be careful because there are many monkeys that like to steal bags. So you can't leave your bags unattended :(

text: Mantapp..bermain dan bersantai ditempat ini..makanan yg plg saya suka disini sate kelinci..harga 35 rb..belinya harus pake koin
english_translation: Awesome..playing and relaxing at this place..my favorite food here is rabbit satay..price 35 thousand..you have to buy it with coins

text: Air terjun yang eksotis, niagara mini di jawa barat.perlu penataan yang lebih agar pengunjung merasa lebih nyaman datang kesini
english_translation: Exotic waterfall, mini Niagara in West Java. It needs more arrangement to make visitors feel more comfortable coming here.

text: Tempat wisata yg ada di lembah dkt tanjakan emen. Luas dan banyak arena utk menikmati keindahan alam. Ada area utk berkuda juga
english_translation: Tourist attractions in the valley near Tanjakan Emen. Spacious with many areas to enjoy the natural beauty. There is also a horse riding area.

text: Masyaa Alloh suasana seperti keliling dunia sampai ngesang ,sambil menikmati alam asri puaslah dikasih copi cool alhamdulillaah
english_translation: Subhanallah, the atmosphere is like traveling the world until I'm sweating, while enjoying the beautiful nature, I am satisfied with the coffee, Alhamdulilah.

text: Tempatnya nyaman dan banyak saung2 untuk berteduh. Dulu pas kesini ada pungli sebelum lokasi. Semoga sekarang tidak ada pungli.
english_translation: The place is comfortable and there are many gazebos for shade. Previously, when I came here, there was an illegal levy before the location. Hopefully, there is no illegal levy now.

text: Selain ada cukup banyak air terjun, di lokasi ini juga jaraknya tidak jauh untuk menjangkau air terjun satu dengan yg lainnya,.
english_translation: Besides having quite a few waterfalls, at this location, the distance between one waterfall and another is also not far.

text: Selalu suka ke sini.... Viewnya bagus... Sekarang udah sangat tertata baik.... Spot2 untuk foto2nya pun sudah banyak disediakan
english_translation: Always like coming here.... The view is good... It's very well organized now.... Plenty of photo spots have also been provided

text: Tempatnya bagus, ada beraneka macam tanaman hias dan buah yang bisa dibeli. Oiya, kalau bawa kamera mirrorless/dslr kena charge
english_translation: The place is nice, with a variety of ornamental plants and fruits for sale. Oh yeah, if you bring a mirrorless/DSLR camera, there's a charge.

text: Menyegarkan mata, harga lumayan, walau hanya bebatuan tapi keren. Sayang jalan masih berbatu dan tanah, kalau hujan jadi lumpur
english_translation: Refreshing for the eyes, the price is reasonable, even though it's just rocks, it's cool. Too bad the road is still rocky and dirt, it turns into mud when it rains.

text: Nyaman untuk membawa keluarga terdapat banyak jajanan pasar area parkir cukup luas terdapat danau menjadikan suasana menyejukan
english_translation: Comfortable for bringing the family, there are many market snacks, the parking area is quite spacious, there is a lake, making the atmosphere refreshing

text:
Tempat nya ok, dari Bandung ke arah gunung halu.

Jalan dari parkiran ke airterjun sekitar 1,2 km. Bisa naik ojek bayar 30 ribu.
english_translation: The place is okay, from Bandung towards Gunung Halu. The walk from the parking lot to the waterfall is about 1.2 km. You can take a motorcycle taxi for 30 thousand.

text:
Pemandangan alam yang exotis and nice for make amzing story😍
turun naik tangganya banyak... udahnya kaki pegel ampe seminggu😭😭 …
english_translation:
Exotic and nice natural scenery for making amazing stories😍
There are many ups and downs in the stairs... my legs were sore for a week afterward 😭😭 …

text:
Curug Pelangi Cimahi...
Wisata alam di daerah Cimahi....
Air Terjun Pelangi Cimahi...
Destinasi Wisata Alam di Kawasan Cimahi
english_translation:
Rainbow Waterfall Cimahi...
Nature tourism in the Cimahi area....
Rainbow Waterfall Cimahi...
Nature Tourism Destination in the Cimahi Area

text: Saya datang untuk kedua kalinya,bawa teman2 alumni SMP,nyoba masuk kedalam goa,sensasi sekali,serasa kembali saat camping SMP...
english_translation: I came for the second time, bringing alumni friends from middle school, trying to enter the cave, it was quite a sensation, felt like going back to middle school camping...

text: Tdk sesuai ekspektasi, di bayangan ada pasar sayur buah dan kebutuhan2 dapur lain...ternyata cm jajanan floating nya jg cm dikit
english_translation: Not as expected, I imagined there would be a fruit and vegetable market and other kitchen necessities... turns out it's just snacks, and the floating ones are also very few.

text: Lembah dewata salah satu rekomendasi tempat wisata di lembang, bandung jawabarat, dengan pemandangan yang indah untuk di datangi
english_translation: "Valley of the Gods" is one of the recommended tourist spots in Lembang, Bandung, West Java, with beautiful scenery to visit.

text: Suasananya sejuk. Penuh dan banyak orang pas weekend. Di sarankan datang pagi jam 7/8 kalau ingin menikmati sejuknya tempat ini.
english_translation: The atmosphere is cool. It's crowded and full of people on the weekend. It's recommended to come early around 7 or 8 AM if you want to enjoy the coolness of this place.

text: Sejukkk, tapi capekkk euyy jalannya! Tapi sukak sih ada metro mini yang anterin balik ke parkiran setelah turun jauh ke bawah :)
english_translation: So cool, but the walk was tiring! But I liked that there was a metro mini to take me back to the parking lot after walking so far down :)

text: Lokasinya mudah di jangkau, kendaraan bisa sampai parkiran. Kalo mau kemping juga gak usah repot, peralatan bisa sewa di lokasi.
english_translation: The location is easy to reach, vehicles can get to the parking lot. If you want to camp, there's no need to bother, equipment can be rented on-site.

text: View yang luar biasa, tapi sedikit risih dengan para pedagang yang sering mengikuti pengunjung yang sedang menikmati pemandangan
english_translation: An amazing view, but a little bothered by the vendors who often follow visitors while they are enjoying the scenery

text: tiket masuk murah 27 ribu/orang, namun banyak sekali pedagang yang tidak jarang mengganggu untuk membeli dagangannya denga paksa
english_translation: Cheap entrance ticket for 27 thousand per person, but many vendors often aggressively bother you to buy their goods.

text:
Semakin tertata semakin bersih semakin indah,,,, bagussss

Htm weekend 25k
Weekday 20k

Ada juga penyewaan bebek sama sepeda dll
english_translation:
The more organized, the cleaner, the more beautiful,,,, excellent

Weekend entrance fee 25k
Weekday entrance fee 20k

There is also a rental for paddle boats, bicycles, etc.

text: Seruuu tempatnya, rada jauh sih harus ke atas punclut tapi begitu sampe diatas terpuaskan banget sama tempat2 yang ada disana 😍😍
english_translation: The place is fun, it's a bit far, you have to go up Punclut, but once you get to the top, you're really satisfied with the places there 😍😍

text:
Bagus, luas banget tempatnya.
Kalo malam pasti keren banget deh lampu2nya.
Sayang kami perginya pagi
Untung bisa naik flying fox
english_translation:
Great, the place is really spacious.
The lights must be really cool at night.
Too bad we went in the morning.
Luckily, we could do the flying fox.

text: Bagus.... masuknya 20k/org.... diatas 2th bayar...tumbuhannya murah, pohon mint pot kecil 25k..... tomat 3ons  petik sendiri 15k
english_translation: Good.... entrance is 20k/person.... over 2 years old pay... growth is cheap, small pot mint tree 25k..... 3oz tomatoes pick yourself 15k

text: Menu masakan lumayan lengkap, harga standar, rasa lumayan.... dan ada fasilitas outbound... Cucok untuk keluarga & anak² sekolah
english_translation: The food menu is quite complete, prices are standard, taste is decent.... and there are outbound facilities... Suitable for families & school children

text: Fenomena alam yg indah dengan udara yg dingin tp segar,,gak salah jauh jauh dr jogja berkunjung ke sini... Sangat mengagumkan 👍👍
english_translation: A beautiful natural phenomenon with cold but fresh air... It was worth traveling far from Jogja to visit here... Absolutely amazing 👍👍

text: Pemandangan alami kawah sangat bagus,  lokasi terjangkau dengan mobil kecil, tempat bersih, banyak penjual makanan dan souvenir.
english_translation: The natural scenery of the crater is very good, the location is accessible by small car, the place is clean, and there are many food and souvenir vendors.

text: Wisata jalan sehat dengan pemandangan perbukitan dan kesegaran pohon pinus. Spot swafoto yang bagus, alam pegunungan yang sejuk.
english_translation: Healthy walking tour with views of hills and the freshness of pine trees. Good selfie spot, cool mountain nature.

text: Swrruuuuuu bgt nih kesini sama keluarga tapi jangan pas weekend ya penuuhh dan macet blm lagi parkirnya mahal bgt bisa kena 30rb
english_translation: So crowded here with family, but don't come on weekends, it's packed and congested, not to mention the parking is super expensive, can be 30 thousand.

text: Tempat nya artistic bagus kalau untuk foto foto tapi sudah ada beberapa sampah berserakan. Perlu dibersihkan agar tempatnya enak
english_translation: The place is artistic and good for photos, but there is already some scattered trash. It needs to be cleaned so the place is enjoyable.

text: Mantap, ada sungai nya, ada curug nya, ada kebon teh nya, ada pohon pinus nya ada naik dan turun trek nya, musholah dan WC dekat
english_translation: Awesome, there's a river, there's a waterfall, there's a tea plantation, there are pine trees, there are uphill and downhill trails, and a prayer room and toilet are nearby.

text:
Mantaaapp dari staff sampe burung burungnya wkwkwkj
Masakan enak
Breakfast bervariasi
Oelayanan ramh
Tempat bersih dan sejuk bgt
english_translation:
Awesome, from the staff to the birds, haha.
Delicious food.
Varied breakfast.
Friendly service.
Very clean and cool place.

text: Spot untuk foto bagus..tempat nya masih bersih dan tertata. Datang hari jumat lumayan gak penuh. Tidak ada permainan untuk anak2
english_translation: Great spot for photos.. the place is still clean and organized. Came on Friday and it wasn't too crowded. No games for kids

text: Bagus banget, banyak banget jenis2 anggrek yg bisa kita liat. Oiaa ada bermacam2 kaktus jg looh. Ada sekumulan bunga matahari jg
english_translation: Really good, so many types of orchids we can see. Oh, and there are also various kinds of cacti. There's a cluster of sunflowers too.

text: Tempatnya hampir mirip di Belitung, jalan kaki dari tempat parkir hampir 1jam,turun naik bukit.tapi terbayarkan pas sampe lokasi
english_translation: The place is almost like in Belitung, walking for almost 1 hour from the parking lot, going up and down hills. But it's worth it when you reach the location.

text:
Enak buat ngadem
Murah meriah
Tiket masuk hari minggu 15ribu
Tutupnya jam 18.00
Tp emang enak sore kalo kesini
Biar ga kepanasan
english_translation:
Good for cooling off
Affordable
Sunday entrance ticket is 15,000
Closes at 6 PM
But it's really nice in the afternoon to come here
So it's not too hot

text: Tempat wisata alam andalan jawabarat yg merupakan perbatasan geografis dr kabupaten subang dengan kbb dan wil jawabarat lainnya.
english_translation: The flagship natural tourist spot of West Java, which forms the geographical border between Subang Regency and Bandung Regency (KBB) and other areas of West Java.

text: Tempat terbaik untuk berkumpul bersama keluarga, monumen mini yang bagus dari seluruh dunia, tempat yang sempurna untuk berfoto
english_translation: The best place to gather with family, a nice mini monument from around the world, a perfect place for photos

text: Ada banyak kawah ditangkuban perahu, tetapi saat ini hanya 2 kawah yang boleh dikunjungi, yaitu kawah Ratu dan kawah Domas saja.
english_translation: There are many craters on Tangkuban Perahu, but currently only 2 craters are open to visitors, namely Ratu Crater and Domas Crater.

text: Tempat yg sangat cocok untuk kembali ke alam.. harga terjangkau di tipe cemara dengan kapasitas 6 orang dan dapat sarapan buffet
english_translation: A very suitable place to return to nature.. affordable price for the cemara type with a capacity of 6 people and includes buffet breakfast

text: Biaya masuk sangat mahal. Terlalu banyak pedagang asongan yang keras kepala menawarkan dagangannya hingga mengganggu pengunjung.
english_translation: The entrance fee is very expensive. There are too many persistent hawkers offering their wares, disturbing visitors.

text: Cocok untuk menyejukan jiwa ,, tempat asri ,, tiket memang sedikit mahal dan siapkan fisik yg kuat untuk menaklukan tangga nya..
english_translation: Suitable for soothing the soul, a beautiful place, the ticket is indeed a bit expensive, and prepare a strong physique to conquer the stairs.

text: harga terjangkau dan pemandangan baagus. kloksni dilarang membawa  makanan maauupun minuman ya guys ada pemeriksaan scr sampling
english_translation: Affordable prices and beautiful views. Bringing food or drinks is prohibited, guys, there's random sampling checks.

text: Tempatnya nyaman, udara sejuk, adem banget malah harus pakai jaket, masih ada monyet liar nya juga.. hati2 klo bawa makanan 😊😃 …
english_translation: The place is comfortable, the air is cool, very refreshing, you even need to wear a jacket. There are still wild monkeys around, so be careful if you bring food 😊😃…

text: Suasana tenang tentram teduh. Meski akses ke lokasi agak kurang bagus apalagi kalau musim hujan. Tapi pas untuk liburan keluarga
english_translation: Peaceful, tranquil, and serene atmosphere. Although access to the location is a bit poor, especially during the rainy season. But it's perfect for a family vacation.

text: Fasilitas wc, tempat makan, spot utk foto banyak dan bagus, taman bersih,sayangnya ga ada spot utk bermain di air arung jeramnya
english_translation: Restroom facilities, dining areas, and many good photo spots, the park is clean. Unfortunately, there are no spots for whitewater rafting.

text: The best! Cuman agak jauh sih lokasi nya jalan lagi, tarif ya murmer.. Tapi kesini puas hati karena view enak trus bisa berenang
english_translation: The best! It's just a bit far, the location is walkable, the price is cheap. But coming here made me happy because the view is nice and I could swim.

text: Tempat bagus. Hanya saja security di setiap pos perlu menyediakan payung & gercep kalo ada tamu yg kehujanan, apalagi bawa bayi.
english_translation: Nice place. It's just that the security at each post needs to provide umbrellas and be quick if there are guests caught in the rain, especially if they are carrying a baby.

text: Bagus pemandangannya, petugas ramah2 dan mau banget bantu motoin pengunjung, sarana  kurang banyak, live musiknya okeeh pokonya👍
english_translation: The view is good, the staff are friendly and very willing to help take photos of visitors, the facilities are lacking, the live music is okay, all in all 👍

text: Tempat masih asri. Kalo kesini mending pas cuaca terang antisipasi aja kalo ujan takut cidera pas naik turun tangga karena basah
english_translation: The place is still pristine. If you come here, it's better to do so when the weather is clear, just in case it rains and you fear injury when going up and down the stairs because they might be wet.

text: Perlu professional management yg bisa memberdayakan penduduk lokal setempat supaya fasilitas dan sarana bisa lebih baik lg 👍👍👍 …
english_translation: Professional management is needed that can empower the local population so that facilities and infrastructure can be even better 👍👍👍

text: Rainbow slidenya seruu banggetzz serta masih bnyak wahana2 seru lainya,,cocok tuk semua umur,, rekomend tuk datang berwisata dsni
english_translation: The rainbow slide is super fun, and there are many other exciting rides too. It's suitable for all ages, recommended for a visit here.

text: Ke Bandung belum lengkap tanpa ke sini,untuk tiket yg lumayan mahal tolong jalan dari pintu masuk ke area parkir bisa diperbaiki.
english_translation: A trip to Bandung isn't complete without visiting here; for the rather expensive ticket price, please fix the path from the entrance to the parking area.

text: Tempatnya bagus, asik buat liburan keluarga atau field trip sekolah. Tiketnya tidak all in. Ada beberapa wahana harus bayar lagi.
