english_translation: New playground in Punclut.. same location as Dago Bakery, Sudut Pandang. Nice.. photo spots. Entrance ticket is 50rb/person which can be exchanged for a drink.

text: Keren tempatnya, kabut dah tebal meski blm jam 4 sore, klo mo jajan atau naik kuda baiknya tanya dulu harga nya biar ga asal tembak
english_translation: The place is cool, the fog is already thick even though it's not 4 PM yet. If you want to buy snacks or ride a horse, it's best to ask for the price first to avoid being overcharged.

text: Akses menuju lokasi, jalannya kurang baik. Toiletnya kotor kurang terawat. Suasana nyaman sejuk cocok untuk yg punya jiwa petualang
english_translation: Access to the location, the road is not good. The toilet is dirty and poorly maintained. The atmosphere is comfortable and cool, suitable for those with an adventurous spirit.

text:
Pemandangan nya mantap. Hanya saja, akses menuju CIC masih kurang bagus.
Lengkapi lagi dengan wahana wahana permainan anak lainnya.
english_translation:
The view is great. However, access to CIC is still not good.
Add more playground rides for children.

text: tempat wisata alami yg populer di bandung, dengan danau dan pemandangan yg nyaman buat mata, kuliner, permainan air dan banyak lagi

text: Kalo mau kesini mendingan seklian nginep arau datang sebelom subuh untuk menikmati kabut view nya, kalo kesiangan dah ga akan dapet
english_translation: If you want to come here, it's better to stay overnight or come before dawn to enjoy the foggy view. If you come too late, you won't get it.

text: Lokasi mudah dilalui dengan kendaraan bermotor, jalan sedikit dari parkiran, harga tiket masuk terjangkau dan cocok untuk anak-anak
english_translation: Easily accessible by motor vehicle, a short walk from the parking lot, affordable entrance fee and suitable for children

text: Seru jalan jalan bersama keluarga tempatnya adem makanannya komplit free minuman hangat pula , ada wahana baru pula anak anak happy
english_translation: It's fun to hang out with the family, the place is cool, the food is complete, plus free hot drinks, and there's a new attraction too, the kids are happy.

text: bagus, pohon pinusnya. semuanya rindang, tempatnya sejuk. ada banyak yang bisa dikunjungi, mulai dari outbond hingga petik stroberi
english_translation: Good, the pine trees. Everything is shady, the place is cool. There are many places to visit, from outbound to strawberry picking.

text: Pasilitas jalan belum bagus dan tempat wisata belum dikelola dengan baik. Ditambah biaya masuk dikutip 3 kali ditambah uang parkir.
english_translation: The road facilities are not yet good and the tourist attractions are not well managed. In addition, the entrance fee is charged 3 times plus parking fees.

text:
Wisata alam. Parkiran luas dan ada tersedia toilet bersih dan dpot foto2.
Ada juga pedagang yg menjual oleh2 dari tangkuban parahu.
english_translation:
Nature tourism. Spacious parking lot with clean toilets and photo spots available.
There are also vendors selling souvenirs from Tangkuban Perahu.

text: Lokasi alam hutan pinus yg nyaman untuk nyantai istirahat yg juga tersedia untuk glaming dan acara2 family gathering atau reunian..
english_translation: A comfortable pine forest nature location for relaxing and resting, which is also available for glamping and family gathering or reunion events.

text: Worth it!!! Harga tiketnya 10rb/orang, parkir mobil 10rb, jalan kaki dari parkiran ke tempatnya 10 menit. Di sini bisa ngecamp juga
english_translation: Worth it!!! The ticket price is 10,000 IDR/person, car parking is 10,000 IDR, walking from the parking lot to the place takes 10 minutes. You can also camp here.

text: Fun games nya syeruuu kocak pokona keren abiiss.. kalian semua wajib nyobain k grafika ajakin temen2 nya juga biar makin syeruuu...
english_translation: Fun games, it's exciting, hilarious, and absolutely cool! You all must try it, go with your friends too so it's even more exciting...

text: Suasana yang asri, area parkir luas, terdapat camping ground, outbond area dan berbagai fasilitasi penunjang lainnya.. Toilet bersih
english_translation: The atmosphere is beautiful, the parking area is spacious, there is a camping ground, an outbound area, and various other supporting facilities. Clean toilets.

text:
Wisata keluarga yang menyenangkan.
Menatap bunga nan indah sangat menenangkan.
Htm 20 ribu per orang
Pakai camera kenah biaya 50ribu
english_translation:
Fun family tour.
Looking at beautiful flowers is very calming.
Entrance fee 20 thousand per person
Using a camera costs 50 thousand

text: Nyobain gowes nyurugnya tapi pas mau ke curug nya batal akses nya ga nyaman bawa sepeda akhirnya cuma poto" disekitaran hutan pinus.
english_translation: Tried cycling to the waterfall but decided against it because the access wasn't convenient for carrying the bike, so I just took photos around the pine forest.

text: Mantap cocok banget buat ngecamp tempatnya enak jln ke curugnya juga gak seperti Curug lain kali Curug ini enak dipenuhi pohon Pinus
english_translation: Awesome, it's perfect for camping, the place is nice. The walk to the waterfall is also not like other waterfalls; this waterfall is nice, filled with pine trees.

text: Btw MENURUTKU bagus luas..tempat sejuta umat tapi keknya klo wktu liburan rame bgt jdi gmn gtu mnding hari2 biasa deh klo kesini 😂 …

text:
Saat saya kunjungi, tempat ini msh soft opening. Menyediakan spot2 untuk berfoto.
Selain itu, jg terdapat jembatan gantung. Not bad.
english_translation:
When I visited, this place was still soft opening. It provides photo spots.
Besides that, there is also a suspension bridge. Not bad.

text: Sayangnya ke kawah domas harus bayar lagi ,mesti pake jasa pemandu, dulu engga kaya gitu  saya bukan turis asing, saya orang bandung
english_translation: Unfortunately, to go to the Domas crater, you have to pay again, and you have to use a guide service. It wasn't like that before. I'm not a foreign tourist, I'm from Bandung.

text: Pemandangannya maasyaallaah bagus. Sudah cukup rapi.  Banyak pedagang suvenir dan makanan.  HTM@30rb. Tiket masuk mobil+parkir 40rb.
english_translation: The view is, mashallah, beautiful. It's already quite tidy. Many souvenir and food vendors. Entrance fee is 30,000 IDR. Car entrance ticket + parking is 40,000 IDR.

text: Tempat ini memiliki beberapa tempat ikonik yang terkenal seperti menara Eifell, santorini, patung liberty, sphinix dan banyak lagi.
english_translation: This place has several famous iconic spots like the Eiffel Tower, Santorini, the Statue of Liberty, the Sphinx, and many more.

text: Lumayan yah untuk turun menuju curug ,lewatin anak tangga.tiket 20rb..ini sudah dikelola perhutani..lokasi ada dikanan pinggir jalan

text: Tempatnya bagus cukup luas ada air terjun kecil n sungai n jembatan banyak destinasi untuk  uji nyali n cukup menguras adrenalin ...
english_translation: The place is nice, quite spacious, with a small waterfall, a river, and a bridge. Many destinations for testing courage and enough to drain adrenaline...

text: Cuman liat kawah doang si tp kalo sepi pengunjung enak kok suasananya, banyak yg jual gelang deketin kita buat nawarin jualannya 😣 …

text: Utk tracking... ini kayaknya lokasi terbaik skitar Bdg. Jalur lumayan utk pemula.  Sepanjang jalur byk air... indah. Sgt recommended
english_translation: Tracking underway... this seems like the best location around Bandung. The path is quite good for beginners. Plenty of water along the trail... beautiful. Highly recommended.

text: Bagus tempatnya luas bgt sampe pegel muter2nya. Lengkap ada tempat makan, main ada. Tempat bersih. Cuma toilet di dlm cuma ada 1 ya.
english_translation: The place is nice and very spacious, I got tired walking around. It's complete with dining and play areas. The place is clean. It's just that there's only one toilet inside.

text: Bagus bangettt, pengen kesana lagi. Sayangnya tiket masuk ga berlaku di semua kawah. Mau ke kawah yg sebelumnya harus banyar dulu :(

text: Tempatnya enak buat trekking. Kempingpun bisa di puncaknya. Hanya motor2 trailnya aja sih bikin bising padahal ke gunung buat nyepi.

text:
Mahasiswa IAI AL AZIZ  Prodi KPI (Pesantren AL ZAYTUN) Indramayu .
Perlu di coba bagi yg suka naik gunung pesona alamnya luar biasa.
english_translation:
Students of IAI AL AZIZ, KPI Program (AL ZAYTUN Islamic Boarding School) Indramayu.
It's a must-try for those who enjoy mountain climbing, the natural charm is extraordinary.

text: Bagus banyak spot photonya,  tapi banyak macam macam bunga,  sayuran yang belum ada jadi saran tambahin macam bunga dan sayurannya .
english_translation: Good, many photo spots, but many types of flowers and vegetables are missing, so the suggestion is to add more types of flowers and vegetables.

text: Floating Market Lembang wisata yang cocok untuk keluarga anda, apalagi adanya pasar terapung kita bisa menikmati kuliner ya uenak ..
english_translation: Lembang Floating Market is a tourist destination that's perfect for your family, especially with the floating market where you can enjoy delicious culinary delights.

text: Wisata murah yang punya nilai sejarah dan keunikan geologi. Cocok bila kawasan ini dijadikan geopark, sayang pertambangan dibiarkan.
english_translation: Affordable tourism with historical value and geological uniqueness. It would be suitable if this area were made into a geopark, it's a shame mining is allowed.

text: suasananya bagus, (tapi sayang waktu itu ada yg nyanyi + setel musik keras², jadi sangat mengganggu). lumayan bersih kamar mandinya.
english_translation: The atmosphere was nice, (but unfortunately at that time someone was singing + playing loud music, so it was very disturbing). The bathroom was quite clean.

text: Enak buat camping... Dingin banget kalau malam.. Sayang pas disini, yang keinget melulu adalah seseorang yg ada di bandung... Wkwkwk
english_translation: Great for camping... Very cold at night.. Too bad when I was here, the only person I kept thinking about was someone in Bandung... Hahaha

text: Tidak banyak yang bisa dilihat di sini. Butuh waktu sekitar 1 jam untuk menyelesaikan semua tamasya. Baru dibuka 4 bulan yang lalu.

english_translation: A beautiful place, but be careful with the rocks. Sometimes falling, you will see danger zones marked by striped barriers

text: Spot foto yang bagus bgt dan disana ada mamang mamang yang super duper baik dengan sukarela mau bantuin foto dan hasilnya bagus bgtt

text: Tempatnya mantap sekali rekomendasi deh tp buat jalan dari gang jalan raya menuju lokasi gunung putri harap segera di perbaiki ya 🙏 …
english_translation: The place is great, highly recommended! But the road from the alley to the Gunung Putri location, please fix it soon 🙏

text: Lokasi curug nya indahhh sejukkk, apalagi sekarang sudah di perbaiki.. Hanya saja kondisi jalan nya sempit dan becek kalau lagi hujan

text: Tempatnya bagus, banyak wahana seperti bebek goes, kebun binatang mini, aneka jajanan, rainbow slide juga taman-taman bunga yg cantik
english_translation: The place is nice, with many attractions like duck rides, a mini zoo, various snacks, a rainbow slide, and beautiful flower gardens.

text: Baguus bangeettttt, pemandangan indah. Sambil main sepeda di sore harii, sangatlahh sejukk. Lagi ada event eid Mubarak, ada bazaar...

text: Sejuk udah pasti suasana alam yg indah di tambah dengan fasilitas yg udah cukup baik rekomendasi buat yg suka dengan kegiatan outdoor
english_translation: Cool, a beautiful natural atmosphere is a given, plus the facilities are already quite good. Recommended for those who like outdoor activities.

text: Icon dari wisata Jawa Barat, tidak banyak yang bisa dilihat apalagi saat kabut. Bau belerangnya sangat menyengat, jangan lupa masker.
english_translation: The icon of West Java tourism, not much to see especially when it's foggy. The sulfur smell is very strong, don't forget a mask.

text:
Bagus sih tempatnya..
Cuma mungkin untuk disananya butuh perhatian lebih pas jalan2nya, batunya licin kalo ujan atau pas basah gitu..

The place is nice though..
It's just that maybe you need to pay more attention while walking there, the rocks are slippery if it rains or when they're wet..

text:
Sejuk tempatnya,tapi sayang jln nya kurang bagus
Klu bisa diperbaiki jln nya,tmn saya sampai jatoh

english_translation:
The place is cool, but unfortunately the road is not very good.
If the road could be fixed, my friend even fell
Because the road is in ruins with no other option.

text: Sangat indah,Bagus Buat foto,Masuk murah Meriah, Kekurangan Ada tempat Pembakaran Kapur.Kadang Asapnya menutupi Pemandangan yang ada.

text:
tempatnya sejuk banget , banyak spot foto instagramable
dekat dari pusat kota bandung
ada wahana flying fox dan taman kelincinya juga
english_translation: The place is very cool, with many Instagrammable photo spots. It's close to Bandung's city center. There's also a flying fox ride and a rabbit garden.

text: Keren asliiii.... Tapi mau kasih tau aja kalo blm masuk area wisata, jgn mau disuru bayar parkir, abangnya bisa bgt nyari duit itu...
english_translation: Awesome, really! But I just wanted to let you know, if you haven't entered the tourist area yet, don't agree to pay for parking. Those guys are really good at making money...

text: Sumpahhh ini tempatnya bagus bangett nget nget ngett konsepnya alam jadi adem gitu sejuk nyaman banget, rapih dan bersih suka bangett
english_translation: Swear, this place is sooooo good! The nature concept makes it so peaceful, cool, and really comfortable. Tidy and clean, I love it so much!

text:
Bagi pencinta tempat intagramable boleh dijadikan tempat tujuan

Ada welcome drink
Akses menujunya lumayan
Tidak bisa menggunakan Bus
english_translation:
For lovers of Instagrammable places, it can be a destination.

There's a welcome drink.
Access to it is decent.
Cannot use a bus.

text: Wahana nya seru, fasilitas lengkap, harga terjangkau, letak strategis, pelayanan ramah, cocok dijadikan untuk acara eksternal sekolah
english_translation: The rides are exciting, the facilities are complete, the prices are affordable, the location is strategic, the service is friendly, it's suitable for school external events.

english_translation: A sort of Bromo of West Java. Already crowded with visitors, it's best to avoid weekends. Because enjoying nature is more comfortable when it's quiet.

text: Baru pertama kali ke sini padahal sering ke Bandung tempat nya nyaman utk keluarga makanan terjangkau dan tiket masuk 30 rb per orang
english_translation: This is my first time here, even though I often go to Bandung. The place is comfortable for families, the food is affordable, and the entrance ticket is 30,000 IDR per person.

text: Bawa rombongan 1 bis medium .. tiket masuk total 700rb .. yaa harusnya kasih dikit lah buat crew bus nya... Kalau bisa bagidu.. hahaha
english_translation: Bring the group by 1 medium bus.. total entrance tickets are 700,000 IDR.. yes, you should give a little for the bus crew... If possible. Hahaha

text: Bagus bnget tempat nya klo untuk santai bawa keluarga, adem angin sepoy, cuma kayk nya tempat ini baru dan masih belum rampung kyk nya

text: Pengalaman team building yang berkesan, dibalut cuaca dan udara yang segar jadi tambah semangat mengikuti semua aktifitas yg disajikan
english_translation: A memorable team building experience, wrapped in fresh weather and air, made us even more enthusiastic to participate in all the activities offered.

text: Liburan murah meriah dengan pemandangan yg indah, minus ga ada petugas keamanan yg cukup, agak takut karena banyak monyet liar disini.
english_translation: Affordable and festive holiday with beautiful views, minus there aren't enough security guards, a bit scary because there are many wild monkeys here.

text: Cukup nyaman buat yg suka berwisata menikmati ke indahan alam, jg sangat cocok buat orang2 yg menyukai tantangan buat memacu adrenalin
english_translation: Quite comfortable for those who like to travel and enjoy the beauty of nature, and very suitable for people who like challenges to pump adrenaline.

text: yang suka dengan wisata air tempat ini cocok buat berenang, kalau musim hujan lebih baik jangan memaksakan untuk kesini ber Bahaya!!!!

text: Tempatnya bagus alami dan cukup bersih jarak dari parkiran dekat hanya 3menit tiket masuk 8k tempat parkir untuk R2 dan R4 cukup luas.
english_translation: The place is nice, natural, and quite clean. The distance from the parking lot is close, only 3 minutes. The entrance ticket is 8k. The parking lot for motorcycles and cars is quite spacious.

text: Udaranya sejuk sekali, kemudian disediakan mobil untuk kembali ke parkiran atas. Banyak spot foto. Sangat cocok untuk liburan keluarga

text: Jangan lupa bawa baju hangat kalau ke sini terutama saat musim hujan, cuaca di atas dingin. Ada beberapa tempat parkir mobil di dalam.

text: Tempatnya peacefull, udaranya segar banget, dinginnnnn... Banyak spot foto bagus. buat yang mau explore bandung. cocok banget ke sini.
english_translation: The place is peaceful, the air is very fresh, coooooold... Many good photo spots. Highly recommended for those who want to explore Bandung.

text: Tempatnya keren makanannya enak mantappp pokoknya ga kecewa kesini untuk yg suka selfie dan kuliner ...waseekkk pol..mantulll.💃💃💃😘🥰😍 …

text: ga bosen maen ketempat ini walopun sudh bberpa x berkunjung, sekarang ada local guidenya yg bisa bantu kita buat foto di spot yg bagus
english_translation: I'm not bored playing in this place even though I've visited a few times, now there are local guides who can help us take photos at good spots.

text: Tiketnya sangat puas sih dengan photo photo nya mantap lah banyak bangett😇 tapi makanannya kebanyakan yang sama dengan harga tiket 😄 …
english_translation: The tickets were very satisfying, especially with the amazing photos, there were so many! 😇 But the food was mostly the same for the ticket price 😄 …

text:
Perjalanan menuju ke curug tidak terlalu jauh dari tempat parkir, dan medannya tidak terlalu sulit.
Airnya berlimpah, bagus dan segar.
english_translation:
The journey to the waterfall is not too far from the parking lot, and the terrain is not too difficult.
The water is abundant, good, and fresh.

text: Gak rekomended buat wisata. Gak sesuai expetasi. Air terjunnya kotor dan berbusa kayak bekas buat nyuci baju. (Maaf ini pengalaman ku)

text: kalo punya anak kecil sih pasti have fun bgt ya disini, bagus tempatnya, cuma apa ya wkwk bingung kalo pasangan muda kesini mo ngapain
english_translation: If you have small children, you'd definitely have a lot of fun here, it's a nice place, but what else, haha, I'm confused about what young couples would do here.

text: Tempat sebenernya bagus..cuma msh ada aja oknum yg nge camp buang sampah sembarangan..jd kumuh tempatnya dan toilet nya kurang terawat
english_translation: The place is actually nice.. it's just that there are still some people who litter indiscriminately.. so the place looks dirty and the toilets are poorly maintained

text: Untuk spot foto banyak, biaya termasuk murah 23rb include dapat air mineral sebotol kecil serta kru pengelola nya ramah diajak ngobrol
english_translation: For photo spots, there are many, and the cost is quite cheap, only 23,000 IDR, which includes a small bottle of mineral water, and the management crew is friendly to chat with.

text: Bentukan batuan karat yang disulap menjadi sebuah taman, bukan sekedar buat berfoto2 tetapi juga buat belajar sejarah geologi Bandung.
english_translation: Rock formations turned into a garden, not just for photos, but also for learning Bandung's geological history.

text: Panoramanya indah bgt dgn batu2 yg unik sprti di zmn Jurasic Park...tempat yg sangat pas utk menikmati sunset,  foto2 & selfie...👍❤😊 …
english_translation: The panorama is very beautiful with unique rocks like in Jurassic Park... a very fitting place to enjoy the sunset, take photos & selfies... 👍❤😊

text: kita mengadakan bike camp disini bersama komunitas sepeda GGS Go Gowes Solidarity dan melakukan keseruan mengulang sejarah selagi muda
english_translation: We are having a bike camp here with the GGS Go Gowes Solidarity cycling community and having fun reliving history while we are young.

text: Spot fotonya banyak, harga tiket masuk cuma Rp. 40.000, dan ada biaya" tambahan lainnya. Untuk beberapa tempat foto, harus bayar lagi.

text: Pemandangan ya luar biasa,, banyak yg foto praweding disini.. Tiket masuk hanya 8000 sewa ban cuma 5000,wisata keluarga murah meriah..

text: Lumayan lah tempatnya buat acara2 keluarga,ada mushola ada kantin yaa lengkap deh,cuma masih kurang seru kalo kesini buat main air mah

text: Tempatnya sejuk nyaman, buat acara keluarga jd menyenangkan. Cuma sayang... datangnya saat musim hujan jadi ga bisa kemana-mana heheee

text: cocok buat outbon atau yg bawa banyak rombongan. Tempat cukup luas dengan fasilitas yg memadai. Pernah coba nginep ala tenda, OK juga.

text: Penataan lokasi nya baik dan asri, jg sbg sarana olah raga sepeda, ticket masuknya sedikit mahal namun sesuai dg benefit yg diberikan.

text: Tempat yg sangat bagus untuk berlibur di akhir pekan.htm sangat murah 10k termasuk parkir motor.bisa berenang atau pun befoto-foto saja

text: tempatnya bagus banget! seru! memacu andrenalin dan bisa buat foto2. Untuk tiket masuknya cukup 5.000 kamu bisa nyobain naik ke batu2annya

text: Glamping nya ok n recommended, namun hot Spring nya semoga bisa dikembangkan lagi terutama management terkait sampah,  bau dan keberrsihan
english_translation: The glamping is okay and recommended, but the hot springs could hopefully be developed further, especially regarding waste management, odor, and cleanliness.

text: Dingin, pemandangannya bagus, cocok kalau bawa anak anak, oiya disarankan bawa mobil kecil biar bisa langsung parkir di samping kawah ratu
english_translation: Cold, the view is good, suitable if bringing children, oh yes, it is recommended to bring a small car so you can park directly next to Ratu crater

text:
Bagus banget tempatnya n luas banget..
Staff nya juga ramah2 banget 😁👍🏻
Recomended lah buat bawa jalan2 keluarga, apalagi buat foto2 😁👍🏻 …
english_translation:
The place is really good and spacious.
The staff are also very friendly 😁👍🏻
Recommended for family outings, especially for taking photos 😁👍🏻

text: Fasilitasnya baik, toilet bersih, tempat shalat bersih. ada angkot gratis di akhir buat ke tempat parkir. tempatnya estetik dan lucu gituu
english_translation: The facilities are good, the toilets are clean, the prayer room is clean. There's a free shuttle at the end to the parking lot. The place is aesthetic and cute.

text: Kurang bgtu tertarik skrng mana tiketny naik lgi,,mngkin lebaran naik juga kali ntr thn bru naik juga lgi hadehh,,tpi mayan dh dri pda kgk
english_translation: Not really interested anymore, plus the ticket prices went up again. Maybe they'll go up for Eid too, and then for New Year's again, sigh. But it's okay, better than nothing.

text: Merasakan hutan dan memjauhi hingar bingar perkotaan wajib kesini. Yang muslim bawa alat shokat sendiri soalnya susah mukena sama sajadah.
english_translation: Experiencing the forest and staying away from the hustle and bustle of the city, you must come here. Muslims should bring their own prayer tools as prayer mats and prayer clothes are difficult to find.

text: Enak buat ngadem sama foto-foto. Tapi gak direkomendasiin buat orang tua. Walaupun jalanan menurun, tetap agak susah buat jalan orang tua.
english_translation: Nice for cooling down and taking pictures. But not recommended for the elderly. Even though the road is downhill, it's still a bit difficult for the elderly to walk.

text:
Penginapannya enak, baguss, luas
Tapi jauh dari tempat keluar/parkir
Dinginn bangetttttt kalo malem
Lengkap dengan outbound seruuu bangettt
english_translation:
The accommodation is good, nice, and spacious
But far from the exit/parking area
Very cold at night
Complete with very fun outbound activities

text: Bagus disini banyak wahana kayak bebek,mobil avp dan perosotan warna tinggi have funlah.pembayaran jajanan harus tuker coin floating market
english_translation: It's good here, there are many rides like ducks, ATV cars, and tall colorful slides, have fun. Payment for snacks must be exchanged for floating market coins.

text: Tiket masuk satu motor dua orang 100 ribu... Tempat bagus bersih dan nyaman... Sjalannya menuju parkiran A masih ada sebagian yang rusak...
english_translation: One ticket for one motorcycle, two people, 100 thousand... The place is nice, clean, and comfortable... The road leading to parking A is still partly damaged...

text: View batu2nya keren dan masih ada monyet2 jg tp sayang banyak penambagan batu kapur disekitarnya. semoga akses ke sana jalannya di perbaiki
english_translation: The rock formations are cool and there are still monkeys too, but unfortunately there are many limestone quarries around. Hopefully the access road there will be improved.

text: Gunung Tangkuban Parahu adalah salah satu Gunung yg bisa didaki dgn motor dan mobil. Pemandangannya cukup bagus dan cuacanya dingin2 empuk.
english_translation: Mount Tangkuban Perahu is one of the mountains that can be climbed by motorcycle and car. The view is quite good and the weather is nice and cool.

text: tempatnya nyaman, banyak sekali variasi bunga, ada juga kebun sayur-sauran nya dibelakang. banyak spot foto, cocok untuk yg suka fotografi.
english_translation: The place is comfortable, with a lot of flower varieties, and there's also a vegetable garden in the back. There are many photo spots, suitable for those who love photography.

text: Bagus,udaranya sejuk. safety juga karena ada pembatasnya and the important things is there is a mosque around the place. A great experience
english_translation: Good, the air is cool. Safe too because there are barriers and the important thing is there is a mosque around the place. A great experience

text: Tempatnya sangat asyik, nyaman, sejuk, banyak wahana permainan buat semua usia, harga terjangkau, ada tempat penginapan, ada juga restoran.
english_translation: The place is very fun, comfortable, cool, has many rides for all ages, affordable prices, there is accommodation, and also a restaurant.

text: Tempat awak favorit keluarga kami utk hiking. Banyak pilihan track hiking, atau sekedar tempat untuk buka tenda dan tertidur di dalamnya :)
english_translation: Our family's favorite place for hiking. Lots of hiking trail options, or just a place to pitch a tent and fall asleep in it :)

text: Lumayan bagus tiket seharga 65rb/org including ice lemon tea/milo ice, jembatan gantung dan beberapa icon dunia ... masih dalam pembangunan
english_translation: Pretty good for a ticket price of 65 thousand rupiah per person including ice lemon tea/milo ice, suspension bridge, and some world icons... still under construction.

text: Banyak buat spot foto khususnya preweding, fotographer sekitaran Bandung sudah banyak tau tempat ini, lokasi ini daerah waduk PLTA saguling
english_translation: Many photo spots, especially for pre-weddings, photographers around Bandung are already familiar with this place, this location is in the Saguling PLTA reservoir area.

text: Lumayan melelahkan dari parkiran menuju curug,alhamdulilah terobati,untuk yg belum kesini siapkan fisik mudah"han kedepanya lebih baik lagi
english_translation: Quite tiring from the parking lot to the waterfall, thank God it was worth it. For those who haven't been here, prepare your physical fitness. Hopefully, it will be even better in the future.

text: Harus persiapin fisik yang kuat kalo mau dateng ke sini. Jalannya belum bagus. Dan ketika sampai di lokasi, sebenernya tempatnya biasa aja.
english_translation: You need to have strong physical stamina if you want to come here. The road isn't good yet. And when you get to the location, the place is actually just ordinary.

text: Lumayan bagus.. klu mau liat menara eiffel, raja firaun,patung liberty.. cukup datang kesini saja... Biaya murah tdk hrs keluar negeri...😊🙏
english_translation: Quite good.. if you want to see the Eiffel Tower, the Pharaoh's king, the Statue of Liberty.. just come here... Cheap cost, no need to go abroad... 😊🙏

text:
suasana nya yaman pemandangan indah byk lokasi to selvi bagus. serasa d bali 😁
.tempat luas ada mainan juga to anak2
pokoknya mantaap 👍👍👍 …
english_translation: The atmosphere is peaceful, the scenery is beautiful, many good photo spots. Feels like in Bali 😁. The place is spacious, there are also toys for the children. All in all, it's awesome 👍👍👍

text: Wisata alam yang bagus buat kumpul dan foto-foto area parkir yang luas tiket masuknya juga aman dikantong dan bisa pesan nasi lewet di sana
english_translation: A great natural attraction for gatherings and photos, with ample parking space, an affordable entrance fee, and the option to order nasi lewet there.

text: HTM murah, Tempat nya sejuk, air terjun nya gak tinggi cocok bawa anak-anak, cuman akses jalan dari dusun bambu ke curug layung rusak parah
english_translation: Cheap HTM, The place is cool, the waterfall isn't high, suitable for bringing children, only the access road from Dusun Bambu to Curug Layung is badly damaged

text:
Penghilang penat, sejuk, luas, nyaman, bersih.
Alhamdulillah banyak toilet juga mushola, bersih semua
Pertahankan u/ kebersihan nya👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻 …
english_translation:
Stress reliever, cool, spacious, comfortable, clean.
Thank God, there are also many toilets and prayer rooms, all clean.
Maintain the cleanliness👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻 …

text: Layak untuk mengambil ratusan anak tangga untuk pergi ke sana karena Anda akan melihat dan menikmati air terjun yang indah dan udara segar
english_translation: Worth it to climb hundreds of stairs to get there because you will see and enjoy the beautiful waterfall and fresh air

text: Pertama kesini th 2017, begitu asri banget, tp sekarang di th 2020 sudah berubah, ada spot biu foto foto, akses jlan sedikit ada perbaikan.
english_translation: First time here in 2017, it was so lush and beautiful, but now in 2020 it has changed, there are photo spots, and the road access has been slightly improved.

text:
Tempat liburan asyik untuk keluarga.
Tapi kalau perginya pas lagi musim hujan hati hati aja, jalan agak licin.
Banyak spot foto yang keren.
english_translation:
A fun holiday destination for families.
But if you go during the rainy season, just be careful, the roads are a bit slippery.
There are many cool photo spots.

text: Cocok buat yg suka hunting foto atau mau berkemah.  Pemandangannya indah.  Harga tiket terjangkau dan dapat gratis jus strawberry loh hehhr
english_translation: Great for those who like photo hunting or want to go camping. The scenery is beautiful. The ticket price is affordable and you get free strawberry juice, lol.

text: Kondisi jalan masuk sangat buruk, hanya cukup untuk 1 mobil. Ada retribusi jalan dan ada tiket masuk lagi di lokasi. Masuk lewat jl masigit
english_translation: The access road condition is very bad, only enough for 1 car. There is a road toll and there is another entrance ticket at the location. Enter via Jl. Masigit

text: Tempatnya sih lumayan cuma kayaknya blm sepenuhnya jadi masih banyak spot2 yang mesti di perbaiki, terutama jalanan berkeliling sepedanya .
english_translation: The place is okay, but it seems it's not fully finished yet. There are still many spots that need to be fixed, especially the cycling paths around it.

text: Buat yg suka panas panasan dan suka area batu bisa menghabisakan waktu disini. Bisa juga buat prewedding karena banyak spot buat photo nya.
english_translation: For those who like to bask in the sun and enjoy rocky areas, you can spend your time here. It's also suitable for pre-wedding photoshoots as there are many spots for pictures.

text: Mantapks buat yg berjiwa muda. Pemandangannya juga keren.makanannya Alhamdulillah enak,minuman dan penyajiannya.Terimakasih Grafika Cikole.
english_translation: Great for the young at heart. The scenery is also cool. The food is Alhamdulillah delicious, as are the drinks and presentation. Thank you Grafika Cikole.

text:
Ya Semoga Pengembangan Fasilitas & MCK'a Di Update 🔥🙌🏻

Semoga Akan Tetap Jadi Hidden Gem, Yg Lokasi'a Ngumpet

6/10'lah Untuk Kondisi Skrg
english_translation:
Hopefully the facility development & restrooms will be updated 🔥🙌🏻

Hopefully it will remain a Hidden Gem, whose location is hidden

6/10 for the current condition

text: Rekomanded buat destinasi liburan keluarga, klo mau leluasa bermain di sini pilih hr biasa,, jd bisa puas main di semua area permainan anak
english_translation: Recommended for a family vacation destination. If you want to play freely here, choose a weekday. That way, you can play to your heart's content in all the children's play areas.

text: Tempat wisata di Bandung yg sejuk dekat dr pusat kota Bandung mudah dituju tempat yg nyam buat liburan keluarga, dengan pemandanga yg indah
english_translation: Cool tourist spots in Bandung close to the city center, easy to reach, a comfortable place for a family vacation, with beautiful scenery.

text:
Tempat wisata alam yg sejuk
Bagus untuk berfoto
Terdapat wisata berkuda
Makanan disini cukup mahal, sebaiknya anda bertanya sebelum membeli
english_translation:
Cool natural attractions
Good for taking photos
There is horseback riding
The food here is quite expensive, it's advisable to ask before buying

text: Biaya parkirnya terlalu mahal.. tidak sesuai dengan harga yang tertera di Nota. Jalan menuju pintu masuk rusak.. semoga segera diperbaiki..
english_translation: The parking fee is too expensive... it doesn't match the price shown on the receipt. The road leading to the entrance is damaged... hopefully it will be repaired soon.

text: Sarea hills lokasi nya masih kurang luas...mo liat view yg bgus harus bayar lagi masuk ke cafe..yg umum nya cm liat rimbunnya pohon bambu..
english_translation: The Sarea hills location isn't very spacious... To see a good view, you have to pay extra to enter the cafe... The general area only offers a view of the dense bamboo trees.

text: masuk kesini pas lg trial opening, waktu tiketnya msh 30.000 .. jd pembangunannya blm beres. Ga tau sekarang mungkin udh lebih bagus ya ? ..
english_translation: Came here during the trial opening, when the ticket was still 30,000... so the construction wasn't finished yet. Don't know if it's better now?

text: Pemandangan luar biasa indah. Tp sayang tiketnya lumayan mahal ya. Ada toilet umum, banyak penjual makanan ringan, buah stroberry, pakaian2.
english_translation: The view is extraordinarily beautiful. But unfortunately, the tickets are quite expensive. There are public toilets, many vendors selling snacks, strawberries, and clothes.

text: Tempatnya bagus, bisa jadi spot foto yg oke banget, rekomen waktu sore2 sih. Ada minigolf juga yg bisa dimainin kalo udh bosen muterin hutan
english_translation: The place is nice, it can be a great photo spot, recommended for late afternoons. There's also minigolf that you can play if you get bored of walking around the forest.

text:
Kenapa wcnya masih berbayar yah ? Padahal sudah ada tiket masuk.
Walaupun pedagang yg menjual jasa foto banyak, tapi ramah2 , tidak memaksa.
english_translation:
Why is the toilet still paid? Even though there's already an entrance ticket.
Although there are many vendors selling photo services, they are friendly and not pushy.

text: Kayaknya kalo hari2 biasa lebih mantap,, soalnya kalo hari2 besar kayaknya lebih kayak pasar pasar kesannya dan sumber airnya cuman satu2nya
english_translation: It seems like ordinary days are better, because during big holidays it feels more like a market, and there's only one water source.

text: Alhamdulillah, tempatnya bersih, asri, sejuk dan bagus, pelayannan nya ramah, tinggal diambil lagi obyek2 replika dunia yg lainnya... 🙂🙂👍👍👍👍
english_translation: Praise be to God, the place is clean, natural, cool, and nice, the service is friendly, I'll just pick up the other world replica objects... 🙂🙂👍👍👍👍

text: Temen temen klo mau kesini helmnya dititip di penitipan jgn di taro di kendaraan . Soalnya klo hilang . Yg jaga nya TIDAK BERTANGGUNG JAWAB!
english_translation: Friends, if you want to come here, leave your helmets at the deposit, don't put them on your vehicle. Because if they get lost, the person in charge is NOT RESPONSIBLE!

text:
Sejuk dan menyenangkan... Apalagi kebersamaan dengan guru 2 RA se Kota Cimahi....
Trimakasih... Atas pelayanan yg baik
Sukses dan maju terus
english_translation:
Cool and pleasant... Especially the togetherness with the teachers of 2 RA from Cimahi City....
Thank you... For the good service
Success and keep moving forward

text: Tempat luas cuaca mendung tapi tidak hujan, sangat dingin.banyak anggrek disini, ada live musik juga  Salah kostum, kami pakai celana pendek
english_translation: Spacious place, cloudy weather but not raining, very cold. Lots of orchids here, there's live music too. Wrongly dressed, we wore shorts.

text: Bersih, sejuk, banyak2 bernapas di sini 😁, dan para pedagang nya ramah, sangat membantu saat mengambil foto, jgn lupa membeli souvenir nya …
english_translation: Clean, cool, lots of breathing room here 😁, and the vendors are friendly, very helpful when taking photos, don't forget to buy souvenirs…

text: Tempat wisata di perbatasan subang bandung, suasana nya adem, kalo hujan dingin sekali . Banyak tempat souvenir dan makan juga di dalamnya .
english_translation: Tourist spot on the Subang-Bandung border, the atmosphere is cool, very cold when it rains. Many souvenir and food places inside.

text:
jalur trekkingnya seru tapi MAHALLLLL.... sagala kudu mayar tiket... hhaha
klo main k kebun teh jangan lupa mampir k warung si emak... hhehe
english_translation:
The trekking path is fun but EXPENSIVE.... everything requires a ticket... hahaha
If you go to the tea plantation, don't forget to stop by at the mother's stall... hehehe

text: Yang kedua kali berkunjung ke Tangkuban Perahu, kali ini bisa ajak anak2 berwisata sambil menikmati indahnya Panorama alam ciptaan Allah SWY
english_translation: The second visit to Tangkuban Perahu, this time I could bring the children for a trip while enjoying the beautiful natural panorama created by Allah SWT.

text: Untuk acara outing keluarga, acara kantor, sangat nyaman, nuansa alamnya bikin move on dari hiruk pikuk nya perkotaan yg sudah banyak polusi
english_translation: For family outings and office events, it's very comfortable; the natural ambiance helps you move on from the urban hustle and bustle, which is full of pollution.

text: jadi biasa aja sekarang tdk seperti dulu lagi sungai sampe curug dipagar kalau kuat jalan ke penangkaran rusa atau ke benteng jepang oke sih
english_translation: It's just normal now, not like before. The river to the waterfall is fenced. If you're strong enough, you can walk to the deer sanctuary or the Japanese fort. It's okay though.

text: Sy dan keluarga besar memilih room di urban, nyaman, view nya indah, bersih, hanya mungkin perlu ditambah jam room service s/d jam 23.00 wib
english_translation: Me and my big family chose a room in Urban, it was comfortable, had a beautiful view, was clean. It would just be good to extend room service hours until 11:00 PM WIB.

text: Dari pintu karcis jalan licin apalagi kalo sedang hujan...worry juga tapi udh sampe diatas sejuk adem..saran spot foto nya ditambah lagi....
english_translation: From the ticket booth, the path is slippery, especially when it's raining... it's worrying, but once you get to the top, it's cool and refreshing... suggest adding more photo spots....

text: pengelola nya ramah . Track nya gak terlalu susah tempat nya seger cmn syang belum ada tempat ganti nya. kasian buat cewe2 yg mau ganti baju
english_translation: The manager is friendly. The track isn't too difficult, and the place is refreshing. It's just a shame there aren't any changing rooms yet. It's a pity for the girls who want to change clothes.

text: Tempat wisata yang sejuk dan indah, akses menuju ini pun terbilang mudah, hanya sayang tempat nya kurang terawat dan masih dikelola seadanya
english_translation: A cool and beautiful tourist spot, access to it is also quite easy, it's just a shame the place is poorly maintained and still managed haphazardly.

text: Tempat Outing di alam terbuka menyediakan tempar tidur ala di hutan layaknya kemping dan ada juga seperti rumah panggung dan udaranya dingin
english_translation: Outdoor outing spots provide jungle-style sleeping arrangements like camping, and there are also stilt houses, and the air is cold.

text: Curug tilu Leuwi opat tempat rekreasi untuk keluarga yg ada didaerah Parongpong lembang Bandung cocok untuk hiking camping dan acara lainnya
english_translation: Curug Tilu Leuwi Opat is a recreational spot for families in the Parongpong, Lembang, Bandung area, suitable for hiking, camping, and other events.

text: Wisata kuliner & alam dengan konsep pasar terapung di tepi danau buatan, dengan metode pembayaran ke penjual menggunakan koin, htm 30k/orang
english_translation: Culinary and nature tourism with a floating market concept on the edge of an artificial lake, with a payment method to sellers using coins, entrance fee 30k/person

text:
Tempat rekreasi yg indah,banyak macam tanaman bunga dan buah yg tertata rapi,sedap di pandang mata.
Masuk membawa 📷 kamera bayar Rp.50.000 …
english_translation:
Beautiful recreational place, many kinds of flowers and fruits neatly arranged, pleasing to the eye.
Entering with a camera costs Rp. 50,000...

text: Keren dan bagus untuk acara keluarga dan gathring suana asri dan nyaman banyak edukasi dsini... kamuh bakalan nyesel kalo gak ksini.. hehehe
english_translation: Cool and good for family events and gatherings, a beautiful and comfortable atmosphere, lots of education here... you'll regret it if you don't come here.. hehehe

text: Tikernya lumayan murah dibanding tempat wisata lainnya di daerah lembang. Wahana yg tersedia banyak, salah satu yang baru adalah Zip Coaster
english_translation: The ticket price is quite cheap compared to other tourist attractions in the Lembang area. There are many rides available, one of the new ones is the Zip Coaster.

text: Belum jadi semua arena nya. HTM murah 10rb perorang. Mungkin karena belum jadi semua. 2rb parkir motor. Nah HTM nya bisa dituker sama minum.
english_translation: Not all arenas are finished yet. The entrance fee is cheap, 10,000 IDR per person. Maybe because not everything is finished yet. 2,000 IDR for motorcycle parking. The entrance fee can be exchanged for a drink.

text: Tempatnya sejuk, Pagi2 dihutan pinus ya enak foto disitu bagus juga tempat ngumpul bagi keluarga keluarga, cocok bagi yang suka tempat sejuk
english_translation: The place is cool, in the morning in the pine forest, it's nice to take photos there. It's also a good gathering place for families, suitable for those who like cool places.

text: Cukup lumayan buat refreshing, cuma sayangnya dengan lokasi yg luas, pengunjung tidak diberi peta agar lebih mudah menjelajah lokasi wisata.
english_translation: Quite good for refreshing, it's just a shame that with the spacious location, visitors are not given a map to make it easier to explore the tourist spot.

text: Tempatnya cukup nyaman untuk berlibur banyak wahana yang ditawarkan terutama wahana edukasi buat anak. Ya walau pun saya ga mencobanya sih..
english_translation: The place is quite comfortable for a vacation, with many attractions offered, especially educational rides for children. Although I didn't try them myself.

text: Bagus, lokasinya memang agak diatas ya, sekitar Lembang, harga tiket 50K dapet welcome drink, sedia kan payung, sometimes suka hujan mendadak
english_translation: Good, the location is indeed a bit up there, around Lembang, the ticket price is 50K and you get a welcome drink, bring an umbrella, it sometimes rains suddenly.

text: Tempat nya. Bagus masih asri, cuma kurang nyaman dg harga tiket segitu, untuk Foto" d lokasi tertentu harus bayar lagi gak boleh bawa makanan
english_translation: The place is nice and still natural, but it's not very comfortable for that ticket price. You have to pay extra for photos in certain locations and aren't allowed to bring food.

text: Curug ini lumayan enak, udara & Susana pegunungan bikin hati adem & tentram, cuma untuk akses jalan masih sangat harus di perhatikan kembali,
english_translation: This waterfall is quite nice, the mountain air and scenery make the heart calm and peaceful, it's just that the road access still needs to be carefully considered again.

text: Mau main-main di air terjun? atau mau camping? piknik bareng keluarga? atau mau menikmati dinginnya kebun teh? Tenang, CIC punya semuanya 😍 …
english_translation: Want to play around at the waterfall? Or want to go camping? Have a picnic with the family? Or want to enjoy the coolness of the tea plantation? Relax, CIC has it all 😍…

text: Sebelum covid melanda saya ngecamp disini, cuacanya dingin bgt, Tempatnya keren sayangnya kamar mandi di puncak pas tengah malem airnya gaada
english_translation: Before covid hit, I camped here. The weather was very cold. The place is cool, unfortunately, the bathroom at the peak in the middle of the night had no water.

text: Suka banget tempatnya bagus, nyaman, pemandangannya bgs banget...bnyk gasebonya jg bwt makan, ad mushola jg. Jlnnya agk nanjak tp msh aman...
english_translation: I really like the place, it's good, comfortable, the view is great... there are also many gazebos for eating, and a prayer room. The road is a bit uphill but still safe...

text: Tempatnya sejuk, udara segar...banyak spot photo..ada miniatur patung liberty, Spinx, Santorini dll...jadi serasa keliling dunia dalam sehari
english_translation: The place is cool, the air is fresh...lots of photo spots...there are miniatures of the Statue of Liberty, Sphinx, Santorini, etc...so it feels like traveling the world in a day.

text: Tempatnya sangat luas t jalan2 kaki cukup bikin pegel walau pandemi lahan parkir mobil smpai ga muat siang hari & masuk lokasi tetap 3M ,,ya!
english_translation: The place is very spacious; walking around is quite tiring, even with the pandemic. The car park is so full it can't fit anymore during the day, and entering the location still requires the 3 Ms (masks, distance, handwashing), yes!

text: Wahana rekreasi cukup asri dengan sungai dan pepohonan yg alami cukup untuk rekreasi bersama keluarga,arena bermain juga bagus tuk anak anak.
english_translation: Recreational area is quite beautiful with a natural river and trees, enough for family recreation, the playground is also good for children.

text: Tiket masuk 10k, dapet sewa topi free selama d taman, bunganya kurang banyak, tempat mushola kalau bisa ada pintunya, toiletnya kurang bersih
english_translation: Entrance fee 10k, get free hat rental while in the park, not enough flowers, the prayer room could have a door, the toilets are not very clean

english_translation: One of the favorite destinations in Lembang, the facilities are quite complete, it's just that for weekends you have to be smart about choosing a visiting time to be more comfortable.

text: Dapat view yang bagus banget saat kabut tebal. Awal trek hujan rintik rintik dan angin yang kuat,seperti badai tapi nyampe puncak ga ada angin lagi
english_translation: Great view, even in thick fog. The beginning of the trail had drizzles and strong winds, like a storm, but by the summit, there was no wind.

text: Sayang nya jarak parkiran kendaraan sama curuknya terlalu jauh .jadi untuk orang tua dan anak2. Kasian .harusnya di buat parkiran kendaraan di atas
english_translation: It's a shame the parking lot is too far from the ravine. It's a pity for the elderly and children. There should be a parking lot built above.

text: Banyak anak tangga yg harus dilewati untuk sampai ke curugnya, tp krn tidak terlalu ramai jd enak dikunjungi untuk quality time bersama yg terkasih
english_translation: Many steps to climb to get to the waterfall, but since it wasn't too crowded, it was a nice place to visit for quality time with loved ones.

text: Mantap pokoknya. Tiket masuk sangat terjangkau. Pemandangan dan suasana alamnya bikin adem hati . recommended banget lah utk liburan di akhir pekan
english_translation: Excellent overall. The entrance fee is very affordable. The natural scenery and atmosphere are very soothing. Highly recommended for a weekend getaway.

text: 10-12-21 rombongan jurusan kebidanan Polkestama prodi Tasik & Cirebon mengdakan sambung rasa/kominikasi internal disini, nyaman dan sejuk tempatnya
english_translation: 10-12-21 The midwifery department delegation from Polkestama, Tasik & Cirebon study programs held an informal gathering/internal communication here; the place is comfortable and cool.

text: Lokasinya cocok untuk liburan bersama keluarga. Bisa camping dan juga ada rumah kayu untuk tinggal. ada games flaying fox jug untuk anak dan dewasa
english_translation: The location is suitable for a family holiday. You can camp and there are also wooden houses to stay in. There's a flying fox game for children and adults.

text: Buat yg suka foto", Jalan",nih ada konsep tempat yg pas banget, tempat nya luas nyaman ,banyak spot fotonya, di jamin seru deh.. yu nyoba mampir yu
english_translation: For those who love taking photos and traveling, here's a concept for a perfect place. The place is spacious and comfortable, with many photo spots. Guaranteed to be fun! Come on, come and try visiting.

text:
Orchid Forest tapi gk ada Orchid nya.. Overall baguslah.. Ada banyak pohon pinus

Seger banget di dalam jalan-jalan. Banyak spot  foto yg bagus jga
english_translation:
Orchid Forest, but there are no orchids... Overall, it's good. There are many pine trees.

It's very refreshing walking around inside. There are also many good photo spots.

text: Tempatnya belum seramai obyek wisata yg lain di Lembang...tapi asik buat santai bersama keluarga..ada beberapa wahana, tapi bayar lagi perwahananya
english_translation: The place isn't as crowded as other tourist attractions in Lembang yet... but it's nice for relaxing with family... there are a few attractions, but you have to pay for each attraction.

text: Artistik tempatnya, bagus buat hunting foto2 cantik... tapi blum terlalu banyak pilihan makanan nya dan fasilitas yg ditawarkan masi kurang menarik
english_translation: Artistic place, good for taking beautiful photos... but not too many food options yet and the facilities offered are still less appealing.

text: Tempat nya Asri... teduh dan adem..bersih banyak spot foto yang bagus kalian wajib datang apalagi tiket masuk murah dan tempat parkir luas. .👍👍👍👍 …
english_translation: The place is beautiful... shady and cool.. clean, with many good photo spots. You must visit, especially since the entrance ticket is cheap and the parking lot is spacious. .👍👍👍👍 …

text: Tempat yang nyaman dan indah, dengan jajaran pohon pinus yang teduh, selain itu pemandangan alam yang bagus, cocok untuk melepas penat dari kerjaan
english_translation: A comfortable and beautiful place, with rows of shady pine trees, besides that, a good natural view, suitable for relieving work stress.

text:
Ke sini niatnya pengen foto box, sampe sana antri di suruh tunggu dulu. Pas balik malah udah tutup poto box nya.
Tp tempatnya enak, spot foto bagus
english_translation:
Came here with the intention of taking photo booth pictures, arrived and had to queue and wait. When I came back, the photo booth was already closed.
But the place is nice, good photo spots.

text: Sepanjang perjalananya menuju tangkuban perahu d suguhkan pemandangan yang luar biasa indahny, sesampai tujuan pemandangan gak kalah menakjubkan😀 …
english_translation: Along the journey to Tangkuban Perahu, you are presented with incredibly beautiful scenery. Upon arrival, the view is no less amazing 😀 ...

text: Liat di maps kayanya bagus, cuma sayang kesini pas cuaca ga mendukung. Harga 30rb lumayan lah, tiket masuk bisa ditukar juga untuk mengambil minum.
english_translation: Looking at the map, it seems nice, it's just a shame I came here when the weather wasn't cooperating. The 30k price is okay, the entrance ticket can also be exchanged for a drink.

text:
Ga terlalu spesial
Tiket masuk 12rb + 5rb untuk parkir
Dpr t minuman 1

Aksesnya sangat berbatu
Bemper bakal rusak...

Masih bnyk sampah berserakan
english_translation:
Not too special
Entrance ticket 12k + 5k for parking
No drinks 1

The access is very rocky
The bumper will be damaged...

Still a lot of trash scattered around

text: Masyaalloh....ta,jub melihatnya ...coba guy kunjungi.....pemandangan alami dan yang pasti buat pencinta panjat tebing tantangan untuk menaklukannya
english_translation: Wow... you have to see this... come visit..... natural scenery and definitely for rock climbing enthusiasts, a challenge to conquer it.

text: Tempatnya mudah dijangkau, tidak jauh dari parkiran. Nuansa alam yg sedikit berbeda, dengan batuan purba yang sangat indah. Mahakarya sang Pencipta.
english_translation: The place is easily accessible, not far from the parking lot. A slightly different natural ambiance, with very beautiful ancient rocks. A masterpiece of the Creator.

text: Tempatnya bagus dan saya suka. Untuk turun dan naik menuju curug Malela sungguh luar biasa, perlu stamina dan tenaga. Tapi terbayar dengan curugnya.
english_translation: The place is nice and I like it. Going down and up to the Malela waterfall is truly amazing, it requires stamina and energy. But it's worth it for the waterfall.

text:
Ini adalah tempat untuk mengambil foto dengan latar belakang konstruksi boneka tujuh keajaiban.
Begitu saja... Tidak cocok untuk warga lanjut usia.
english_translation:
This is a place to take photos with the Seven Dwarfs construction background.
That's all... Not suitable for the elderly.

text: Bagus.. kabutnya haha karna waktu kesana sedang hujan deras ,dan setelah reda isinya kabut manja..  tetep indah.blm sempat turuun ,next kembali lagi
english_translation: Nice.. the fog, haha, because it was raining heavily when I went there, and after it stopped, it was filled with gentle fog.. still beautiful. Haven't had a chance to go down yet, will come back next time.

text: Waktu terbaik datang kesini adalah saat sun rise ataupun sun site... View nya amazing...jalan dr parkirannya tdk jauh dan sudah ditata dg cukup baik
english_translation: The best time to come here is during sunrise or sunset... The view is amazing... the walk from the parking lot is not far and it's already arranged quite well.

text:
Alhamdulillah sekarang sudah dikelola dengan baik. Mudah-mudahan ke depan jadi tempat primadona wisata di daerah Cimahi.
Hati-hati jalannya licin...
english_translation:
Alhamdulillah, it is now well managed. Hopefully in the future it will become a prima donna tourist destination in the Cimahi area.
Be careful, the road is slippery...

text: Cukup Bagus untuk foto2, sayangnya jalan di dalam masih buruk sehingga harus berhati-hati, banyak monyet juga jadi hati-hati untuk yang bawa makanan
english_translation: Good enough for photos, unfortunately the road inside is still bad so you have to be careful, there are also many monkeys so be careful if you bring food

text: Tempatnya luas. Ada arena permainan baru tapi gk berani nyoba. Aku takut sama ketinggian. Ada taman unggas. Jual souvernir nya juga harga terjangkau
english_translation: The place is spacious. There's a new game arena but I didn't dare to try it. I'm afraid of heights. There's a bird park. They also sell souvenirs at affordable prices.

text: tempatnya masih alami, jalan menuju ke curug dr loket lumayan jauh dan melewati beberapa jembatan yg kondisinya rusak, cukup membahayakan pengunjung
english_translation: The place is still natural, the road to the waterfall from the ticket counter is quite far and passes several bridges that are in disrepair, quite dangerous for visitors

text: masyaalloh tempatnya bagus bgt, indah pemandangannya, makanan jg enak.taoi sayang kesini udah kesorean, blm semua tempat dikunjungi..sejuk udaranya.
english_translation: Masha'Allah, the place is really nice, the scenery is beautiful, and the food is delicious too. But unfortunately, we came too late in the afternoon, and haven't visited all the places yet. The air is cool.

text: Sangat luas dan tempatnya nyaman, belum lagi banyak spot foto, cocok untuk acara outdoor, bisa untuk goto prewedding, dan bersantai bersama keluarga
english_translation: Very spacious and comfortable, not to mention many photo spots, suitable for outdoor events, can be used for pre-wedding photoshoots, and relaxing with family

text: Hotel dan Taman wisata dengan tema hutan pinus, ada flying fox walaupun tracknya pendek. Untuk balita ada taman kelinci dan bisa memberi makan rusa.
english_translation: Hotel and tourist park with a pine forest theme, there's a zipline although the track is short. For toddlers, there's a rabbit garden and they can feed the deer.

text:
Berwisata sambil mengenang sejarah sangkuriang..
😂😂.. Bandreknya enak sekali disinii apalagi minum nya pake gelas dari bambu sangat tradisional 😍😍 …
english_translation:
Traveling while remembering the history of Sangkuriang..
😂😂.. The Bandrek is very delicious here, especially drinking it from a bamboo glass, very traditional 😍😍 …

text: Pengalaman yang menyenangkan, asri, penginapan bersih, petugas kebersihan selalu ramah dan rajin,  permainan anak seru2, paintball memacu adrenalin.
english_translation: A pleasant, green experience, clean accommodation, the cleaning staff are always friendly and diligent, the children's games are fun, paintball is adrenaline-pumping.

text: Camp ground murmer, pelayanan petugas-nya ramah (pertahankan), suasananya adeeeeeem bingit...😀😀😀.......mushola+toilet+warung makanan tersedia..... …
english_translation: Campsite murmurs, the staff's service is friendly (maintain this), the atmosphere is super cool...😀😀😀.......prayer room+toilet+food stall available.....

text: Suka sih sama pemandangannya jalannya jg gak terjal bgtt banyak tempat wisata sebelum tangkuban perahu.. Ada kudanya juga jadi anak bisa naik kuda..
english_translation: I like the scenery, and the road isn't too steep either. There are many tourist attractions before Tangkuban Perahu. There are also horses, so children can ride them.

text: Selalu ramai dan suasananya tidak banyak yang berubah. Area parkir aman dan luas. Sudah menerapkan protokol kesehatan dan banyak tenda tenda makanan
english_translation: Always crowded and the atmosphere hasn't changed much. The parking area is safe and spacious. Health protocols are implemented and there are many food stalls.

text: Hari kerja yg harusnya tiket masuk 25rb, tpi di suruh bayarnya 100rb haha semoga bisa lebih amanah lg ya yg jaga tiketnya.. buat tempatnya sih bagus
english_translation: The ticket price on weekdays should be 25,000 IDR, but they asked for 100,000 IDR, haha, hopefully the ticket keeper can be more trustworthy. As for the place itself, it's good.

text:
Pemandangannya keren, udaranya sejuk, banyak bunga yg cantik
Pokoknya milenial ataupun keluarga wajib banget coba

Disini suasananya sejuk dan damai
english_translation:
The view is cool, the air is fresh, lots of beautiful flowers
Millennials and families must try it

The atmosphere here is cool and peaceful

text: tempat nya sejuk buangeeet, tiket masuk 20 ribu, parkiran free, cocok buat acara keluarga, sekolah,kantor, jajanan nya standar, gak nge-getok harga..
english_translation: The place is super cool, entrance ticket is 20 thousand, parking is free, suitable for family events, school, and office gatherings, the snacks are standard, and the prices are not rip-offs.

text: Tempat bagus tp kenapa skrg tukar uang jadi koin nya di potong, dulu tukar 200 rb tetep jadi 200 rb, skrg tukar 200 rb jadi koin nya 180 rb ..?? 😌😌 …
english_translation: Good place but why is it now that when exchanging money for coins, the amount is cut? Before, exchanging 200 thousand was still 200 thousand, now exchanging 200 thousand results in only 180 thousand worth of coins..? 😌😌 …

text: Dulu pernah baguss tp skrg jd mahal dan dibangun candi2 artificial gt... sukaan dulu pas msh alami sih.. gils lembah yg terselimutkan kabut magis bat
english_translation: It used to be good, but now it's become expensive and they've built artificial temples... I preferred it when it was still natural... crazy, a valley shrouded in magical mist

text:
Ga terlalu luas tapi padat bunga nya..
Bagus buat foto foto.. Htm 25 rebu
Di pinjemin topi di pintu masuk.. Jangan lupa balikin pas mau keluar wkwkwk

Not too wide but the flowers are dense.
Good for taking photos. Entrance fee 25 thousand.
They lend hats at the entrance. Don't forget to return them when you leave hahaha

text: Masuk beli tiket . tiekt dapat dtukar minumn grtis. Syaa pili milo hangat enak. Hrga mkan standrt tempt wista. Kalo rame sush cr temrp dduk. Cepat2an
english_translation: Enter to buy tickets. Tickets can be exchanged for a free drink. I chose warm milo, it was delicious. Food prices are standard for tourist spots. If it's crowded, it's hard to find a place to sit. First come, first served.

text: Sejuk enak buat liburan . Ya walau perjalanan dari jakarta ke lembang pake motor melelahkan tapi sampai sana terbayarkan dengan keindahan alamnya 😊 …
english_translation: Cool and nice for a holiday. Yes, even though the journey from Jakarta to Lembang by motorbike was tiring, it was worth it when we got there with the natural beauty 😊 …

text: Cocok untuk para pendaki kelas pemula, Tempat nyaman , toilet banyak, spot photo mantul ,Tiket untuk hikking 12K untuk Camp 20K . Kayu per ikat 10K .
english_translation: Suitable for beginner hikers, Comfortable place, plenty of toilets, awesome photo spots. Hiking ticket 12K, Camping 20K. Wood per bundle 10K.

text: Coabain ke wisata yg ada di punclut lembang bandung ini yuuuuk di jamin gak akan nyesel deh udah pasti WOWsaraehills bangeeeet yuuuuuuuk kita main🎉 …
english_translation: Let's go to the attractions in Punclut, Lembang, Bandung. Guaranteed you won't regret it, it's definitely super WOWsaraehills. Let's play! 🎉

text: tempat sejuk, luas banget banyak spot foto, untuk kembali ke parkiran setelah berjalan jauh dapat menggunakan armada yang sudah disediakan dan gratis
english_translation: Cool place, very spacious with many photo spots. To return to the parking lot after a long walk, you can use the provided free shuttle service.

text: Gak tau harus ngomong apa sama curug satu ini, Bau dan udah kotor, jelas banget udah tercemar limbah... not recommended buat liburan tema wisata alam
english_translation: Don't know what to say about this waterfall. It smells and is dirty, clearly polluted by waste... not recommended for a nature tourism holiday.

text: Destinasi wisata yang luar biasa. Serasa berkeliling di luar negeri.  Ada patung liberty dan menara paris.  Jembatan gantung yang menguji adrenalin..
english_translation: An extraordinary tourist destination. It feels like traveling abroad. There are the Statue of Liberty and the Eiffel Tower. A suspension bridge that tests your adrenaline.

text: Asri, seger, bersih, tempatnya luas, banyak spot foto yang instagramable. Sayang belum pernah nyoba jembatannya hehe next time kalo ke sana lagi aaah
english_translation: Asri, fresh, clean, the place is spacious, many Instagrammable photo spots. Too bad I've never tried the bridge hehe next time if I go there again, aaah

text: Wisata buatan berupa miniatur tempat terkenal diluar negeri terutama Eropa dan lokasinya cukup bersih, untuk lebih menarik miniaturnya perlu ditambah
english_translation: Artificial tourism featuring miniatures of famous overseas landmarks, especially in Europe, and the location is quite clean. To make it more interesting, the miniatures need to be added.

text: Tempat wisata wajib kalo liburan disekitar Subang/Bandung. Kalau kesini usahakan pagi ya, kalau udah siang, antri kendaraannya mengular sampai bawah.
english_translation: A must-visit tourist spot for a holiday around Subang/Bandung. If you come here, try to go in the morning. If it's already noon, the vehicle queue will snake all the way down.

text: Jalannya gak terlalu jauh dari jalan raya, mudah dijangkau, Tempatnya masih asri meskipun banyak perubahan, sayangnya harganya jadi makin mahal. Hehe
english_translation: The road is not too far from the highway, easy to reach. The place is still beautiful/natural even though there have been many changes, unfortunately, the prices have become more expensive. Hehe

text: Tempatnya lumayan bagus,sempat ada insiden ketika kami outbond kesana salah satu guru kami terjatuh di wahana,tapi ditanggapi dgn baik oleh petugas..
english_translation: The place is quite good. There was an incident when we went there for an outbound activity. One of our teachers fell on a ride, but the staff responded well.

text: tempat tidak tertata dengan rapi, tempat sampah kurang, akses menuju curug sawer jalan setapak, kurang rambu rambu petunjuk jalan menuju curug sawer.
english_translation: The place is not tidy, not enough trash bins, access to Curug Sawer is a footpath, there are not enough signs pointing the way to Curug Sawer.

text: Tempatnya luas dan bagus banget sumpah, harus kesini pagi" biar puas bisa explore kesemua tempat, banyak banget tempat" yg bisa dijadiin spot foto 🥰😊
english_translation: The place is really spacious and amazing, swear, you have to come here in the morning to fully explore all the spots, there are so many places that can be used as photo spots 🥰😊

text: Terakhir kesini waktu SD,. Sekarang tempatnya sudah lebih bagus,.. udaranya dingin,. Makan jagung bakar dan minum segelas kopi nikmat sekali disini,.
english_translation: I last came here when I was in elementary school. Now the place is much better. The air is cold. Eating grilled corn and drinking a glass of coffee here is very enjoyable.

text: Tempat wisata dan camp yang masih natural , asri , bersih semoga semua penikmat, pecinta dan penggiat alam tetap menjaga keasrian tempat yg indah inu
english_translation: A natural, beautiful, and clean tourist spot and campsite. May all nature lovers, enthusiasts, and activists continue to preserve the beauty of this wonderful place.

text: Jalannya lumayan menantang trs jalur hikingnya ga terlalu berat, curugnya udah pasti keren jadi capenya terbayar lunas, airnya dingin bgt bikin seger
english_translation: The road is quite challenging, and the hiking trail isn't too difficult. The waterfall is definitely cool, so the effort was totally worth it. The water is super cold and refreshing.

text: Keereen tempatnya .. siapkan tenaga untuk menanjak .. sejuk bangett, jangan untuk beli stowberrynya ..hmmm manis dan murah 3 pak 50rb gk mengecewakan
english_translation: The place is steep.. prepare your energy for the climb.. very cool, don't forget to buy the strawberries.. hmmm sweet and cheap, 3 packs for 50 thousand, not disappointing

text: Tempat lumayan nyaman. Sejuk. Yg aku suka pengunjung nya tidak terlalu banyak jadi merasakan alam nya itu bener bisa di hayati . Mantap lah poko nya.
english_translation: A fairly comfortable place. Cool. What I like is that there aren't too many visitors, so you can truly appreciate nature. Awesome, all in all.

text: Udara sejuk..nyaman.hanya saja untuk kendaraan gratis tidak terlihay di lokasi wisata..jadi pengunjung tidak tahu ada mobil untuk kembali ke parkiran
english_translation: Cool air...comfortable. It's just that the free vehicle isn't visible at the tourist location... so visitors don't know there's a car to return to the parking lot.

text: Tempat yg asik bgt buat berlibur bersama keluarga. Tempat rekreasi yg lengkap. Areanya luas dan banyak pohon rindang jd ga terlalu panas kalau siang.
english_translation: A really fun place for a family holiday. A complete recreational area. The area is spacious and has many shady trees, so it's not too hot during the day.

text: Tiketnya cuma 10k, jalannya memang sempit dan agak kurang terawat. Berjalan dari gerbang sekitar 2km. Setelah sampai lokasi bisa istirahat di warung.
english_translation: The ticket is only 10k, the path is indeed narrow and a bit poorly maintained. It's about a 2km walk from the gate. Once you reach the location, you can rest at a warung.

text:
Curug nya keren...
wahana untuk anak anak nya juga ada..
Cocok untuk tamasya bersama keluarga tercinta...
camping bisa juga...
mantap dah pokok nya..
english_translation:
The waterfall is cool...
There are also rides for children...
Suitable for a picnic with your beloved family...
Camping is also possible...
Awesome, basically..

text: Berada di tengah hutan Jalan akses menuju air terjun ini ekstrim Penuh Tantangan namun sangat indah dan dan bagus sekali cocok untuk bermalam di sini
english_translation: Being in the middle of the forest. The access road to this waterfall is extreme. Full of challenges, but very beautiful and very good. Suitable for an overnight stay here.

text: Tiket masuk dan parkir murah,tiket dapat ditukar dengan minuman (lemontea/milo),parkir dibawah tidak begitu luas,pegawai ramah,tempat bersih dan bagus
english_translation: Cheap entrance and parking, tickets can be exchanged for drinks (lemon tea/milo), parking downstairs is not very spacious, friendly staff, clean and nice place

text: Easy trekking to waterfall..hanya jalan menuju lokasi rusak parah. Tolong perhatian pemerintah memperbaiki access ke lokasi Curug Layung. Terima kasih
english_translation: Easy trekking to waterfall.. the only road leading to the location is severely damaged. Please the government pay attention to repairing the access to the Curug Layung location. Thank you

text:
Tempatnya oke, adem dan banyak spot foto. Cuma minumannya gak sesuai expektasi.

Disitunya ada pilihan, tapi cuma dikasih yg jeruk.

Tapi oke, Htm 50k
english_translation:
The place is nice, cool, and has many photo spots. Only the drinks didn't meet expectations.
There were choices there, but they only gave me the orange one.
But it's okay, the entrance fee is 50k.

text: Grafika Cikole bisa dikatakan tempat wisata terpadu. Selain outbound dan tempat rekreasi, ada juga tempat untuk menginap. Pililhan untuk menginap juga
english_translation: Grafika Cikole can be said to be an integrated tourist destination. Besides outbound and recreational areas, there are also places to stay. The choices for staying also

text: Pemandangannya sangat mengagumkan, tidak banyak orang ketika saya pergi ke sana sehingga kedamaian dan kegembiraan di alam liar sangat mengasyikkan
english_translation: The view was amazing, there weren't many people when I went there so the peace and joy in nature was very exciting.

text: Pas kesini airnya lagi keruh, iya soalnya kemarinnya hujan. Dan kata pengelola wisata kalau mau jernih lagi harus nunggu 1 minggu dari hari pas  hujan
english_translation: When I came here the water was murky, yes, because it rained the day before. And the tourism manager said that for it to be clear again, we have to wait 1 week from the day it rained.

text: Tempatnya bagus, nyaman, dan asri. Udaranya bagus banget, tempat yang enak buat healing, apalagi malem malem api unggun. Tapi agak kotor aja kamarnya.
english_translation: The place is nice, comfortable, and natural. The air is great, a good place for healing, especially with a campfire at night. But the room is a bit dirty.

text: Tempatnya asri, wahananya tertata rapi, restoran tersedia dan selain untuk dewasa ada playground untuk anak- anak serta mini zoo yang bisa dikunjungi.
english_translation: The place is beautiful and natural, the rides are well-arranged, restaurants are available, and besides for adults, there's a playground for children and a mini zoo that can be visited.

text: Baiknya ke sini pada musim Kemarau, selain airnya jerniah jalan yg dilalui tidak licin. Ada guide buat antar kalau bingung jalannya, siapin ja tipsnya
english_translation: It's best to come here during the dry season, besides the water being clear, the path you take won't be slippery. There are guides to accompany you if you're lost, just prepare a tip.

text: Jalannya sangat jauh menuju ke lake/danau nya. Terjal dan berpasir. Tdk ada petunjuk. Di sebut perjalanan hanya 30” ternyata 2jam jg blm sampai hahaha
english_translation: The road to the lake is very long. Steep and sandy. No signs. It was called a 30" journey but it turned out to be not even 2 hours yet, hahaha.

text: Kecewa untuk tiket masuk 50rb per orang cuma buat foto, gak ada yg menarik dibanding dengan dusun bambu yg tiket masuk gratis, pemandangan lebih bagus
english_translation: Disappointed with the entrance ticket of 50k per person just for photos, there's nothing interesting compared to Dusun Bambu which has free entrance and better views.
