english_translation: The parking lot is spacious, and the restaurant has many tenants. They charge IDR 20,000: IDR 10,000 for motorcycle parking and IDR 10,000 for admission.

text: Tempatnya bagus u wisata foto, hanya saja d lokasi ga ada resto... Dan kalo pulangnya sore shutle sdh tdk beroperasi, jd menuju ke parkiran hrs jalan....
english_translation: The place is good for photo tourism, it's just that there are no restaurants at the location... And if you go home in the afternoon, the shuttle is no longer operating, so you have to walk to the parking lot....

text: Mantap deh......tambah lagi yah spot fotonya... Masnya bageeuuur pisan ya Allah nawarin pang fotoin... jadi dpt hasil yang bagus...ntar mo kesana lagi ah
english_translation: Awesome......add more photo spots, okay... The guy was sooooooo generous, oh my God, offering to take pictures... so I got good results... I'll go there again later

text: Camping dsni atau cuma skdar main ajh..cocok bgt k tempat ini Krn view ny bs liat sunrise(liat matahari terbit) dan city light,lampu lampu kota lembang..
english_translation: Camping here or just hanging out is perfect for this place because the view allows you to see the sunrise and the city lights of Lembang.

text: Tempatnya bersih, toilet ya juga bersih, disarankan kondisi badan harus prima karena jalan menuju air terjun nya cukup jauh (melewati banyak anak tangga)
english_translation: The place is clean, the toilets are also clean, it is recommended to be in top physical condition as the path to the waterfall is quite far (passing many stairs).

text: Pengalaman baru... tapi tiket masuk 50rb kemahalan menurut saya.. dan kalau mau lewat jembatan hrs beli tiket yg 65rb. Datangnya pagi2 jadi tdk ngantri..
english_translation: New experience... but the entrance ticket of 50k is too expensive in my opinion... and if you want to cross the bridge you have to buy a 65k ticket. Came early in the morning so no queue.

text: Kawasannya sudah ditata ,Cocok buat nginap, sayang kolam rendamnya kemahalan😊 dan gak bisa bawa makanan kedalam. Gak kayak dl waktu smp😆...masih bebas. …
english_translation: The area is well-arranged. Suitable for staying overnight. Unfortunately, the hot tub is too expensive and you can't bring food inside. Not like back in middle school 😆...it was still free.

text: Bagi yang mau menghilangkan jenuh dengan aktivitas sehari2 yang menjenuhkan yu databg ke curug 3 lewi 4...pokonamah adem ayeum...mau kemping juga bisa...
english_translation: For those who want to relieve boredom from their monotonous daily activities, come to Curug 3 Lewi 4... it's peaceful and serene... camping is also possible...

text: Pemandangannya bagus,, tempat yang bagus untuk liburan bersama keluarga.. jembatan golden gate sangat menakjubkan ... indah untuk mengunjungi tempat ini
english_translation: The view is nice, a great place for a family vacation.. the Golden Gate Bridge is amazing... beautiful to visit this place

text:
Jalan menuju kesana tidak bisa di lalui oleh bis kecil /besar,,
Tempat ini lebih cocok di kunjungi orang² yg sedang pacaran,
Dan tidak cocok untuk anak².
english_translation:
The road there cannot be passed by small/large buses.
This place is more suitable for couples to visit,
And not suitable for children.

text: Disini tuh bnyak bgt nama tempat yg ada cafe,tempat tempat keren untuk foto foto semuaaa nyaa memanjakan mata bgt cocok buat healing dan hangout dehh 😍😍😍
english_translation: There are so many place names here with cafes, cool spots for photos, all of it is really pleasing to the eye, perfect for healing and hanging out 😍😍😍

text: Harga tiket masuk sangat worth it, pelayanan dan fasilitasnya memang patut diacungi jempol 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻 pokonya rekomendasi banget buat dateng kesini. Mantap …
english_translation: The entrance ticket price is very worth it, the service and facilities are truly commendable 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻 definitely highly recommended to come here. Awesome…

text: Tempat niis yg enakeun, ada food court, tempat main anak, spot foto bagus sekaligus bisa main flying fox.. Cocok buat yg bawa anak2 juga ada taman rabbit
english_translation: This place is comfortable and enjoyable, it has a food court, a children's play area, good photo spots, and you can also try the flying fox. It's suitable for those bringing children, and there's also a rabbit garden.

text: trek yg cukup menantang untuk pemula, melatih stamina, skill navigasi (khususnya jika tujuan sampai upass hill), dan tentu saja viewnya menyegarkan mata.
english_translation: A challenging trek for beginners, it builds stamina, navigation skills (especially if aiming for Upass Hill), and of course, the views are refreshing for the eyes.

text:
Tempatnya masih relatif baru. HTM juga tidak mahal dan banyak spot foto tidak perlu membayar lagi.

Parkir mobil lebih baik di gedung parkir lantai atas.
english_translation:
The place is still relatively new. The entrance fee is also not expensive and there are many photo spots that don't require additional payment.

Parking the car is better on the upper floor of the parking building.

text: Tempat nya masih bagus, bersih, cuma mungkin karena musim pandemic covid 19.. agak kurang ramai dan kebun buah nya sudah pada kosong.dan kurang perawatan
english_translation: The place is still good and clean, it's just that maybe because of the COVID-19 pandemic... it's a bit less crowded and the fruit garden is empty and lacks maintenance.

text: Tempat nya masih perawan sungai nya asli pegunungan belum terkontaminasi,,ke indahan alam yang hakiki semakin mengingat kan kita pada sang pencipta NYA..
english_translation: The place is still pristine, the river is natural, mountainous, and unpolluted. Its true natural beauty increasingly reminds us of its Creator.

text: Tiket masuk berbeda dengan tiket wahana2 yg ada di dalamnya. Saya hanya mencoba flying fox seharga 25.000 untuk dua jalur. Lalu, 15.000 untuk satu jalur.
english_translation: Entrance tickets are different from the ride tickets within them. I only tried the flying fox for 25,000 for two paths. Then, 15,000 for one path.

text: Cocok untuk wisata keluarga, equestriannya keren.. rekomen latihan berkuda disini, mau jadi atlit juga bisa, pelatih profesional dan berpengalaman banget
english_translation: Suitable for family tours, the equestrian facilities are cool. Recommended for horse riding training here, you can even become an athlete, the trainers are very professional and experienced.

text: Tempat wisata dan berdekatan dengan tempat  berkemah, namun sayang dari pemerintahan belum support untuk perbaikan jalan dari dan menuju tempat wisata...
english_translation: Tourist attractions and close to campsites, but unfortunately, the government does not yet support the improvement of roads to and from the tourist attractions.

text: Tempatnya keren, pengen foto di paris tinggal dtg aja ke sarae hills...😅 bisa di fotoin sm penjaga di sana..dan hasilnya kereen..penjaganya jg ramah2..👍👍
english_translation: The place is cool, if you want to take photos in Paris, just come to Sarae Hills... 😅 You can have the guard there take your photo... and the results are awesome.. the guards are also friendly.. 👍👍

text: Rame bahkan saat bukan tanggal liburan, ada barisan tempat makan, rainbow slide dan naik kapal. Tempat makan pakai sistem koin bukan cash lgsg ke seller.
english_translation: Crowded even when it's not a holiday, there are rows of eateries, a rainbow slide, and boat rides. Eateries use a coin system, not direct cash to the seller.

text:
Rekomen buat acara area outdoor sama outbond..
Pas buat liburan keluarga cocok buat rombongan,banyak arena juga bisa kemping,udaranya bersih masih asri..
english_translation:
Recommended for outdoor events and outbound activities.
Perfect for family holidays, suitable for groups, with many areas and camping facilities, the air is clean and still natural.

text: Setiap masuk ke wahana masih harus bayar kd tdk bisa memperkirakan berapa biaya untuk masuk ke semuanya. Tapi pemandangan di Rainbow Garden bagus banget.
english_translation: Every time you enter a ride, you still have to pay because it's impossible to estimate how much it will cost to enter everything. But the view at Rainbow Garden is really great.

text: Terlalu ramai untuk tempat romantis di malam hari tetapi secara keseluruhan, ini adalah tempat yang bagus untuk bersembunyi dari kesibukan kota Bandung.
english_translation: Too crowded for a romantic spot at night but overall, it's a great place to hide from the hustle and bustle of Bandung city.

text: Cocok untuk keluarga,ttp hati hati krn lokasi yg sering turun kabut sehingga mengurangi jarak pandang saat berkendara dan ttp jaga protokol kesehatan nya
english_translation: Suitable for families, but be careful as the location often experiences fog, which reduces visibility when driving, and continue to maintain health protocols.

text: Andai saja jalan menuju ke atas bisa d perbaiki dan d bentuk jdi kaya tangga, klo hujan jalanya licin banget apalagi ada pipa yg bocor d perjalan ke atas
english_translation: If only the path leading up could be fixed and shaped like stairs. When it rains, the path is very slippery, especially with a leaking pipe along the way up.

text:
Cocok untuk outbond atau acara bersama teman dan keluarga. Ada penginapan dan area camp nya juga.
Suasana cocok untuk refreshing, udara segar dan dingin.
english_translation:
Suitable for outbound or events with friends and family. There are accommodations and a camping area as well.
The atmosphere is perfect for refreshing, with fresh and cool air.

text: Permata tersembunyi yang baru ditemukan dari Bandung Barat. Tidak sabar untuk menyaksikan peningkatan fasilitas, kelancaran jalan, akses, dan lain-lain.
english_translation: A newly discovered hidden gem from West Bandung. Can't wait to witness the improvement of facilities, road smoothness, access, and so on.

text: Harga tiket masuk nya murah,banyak warung jika ingin jajan,hati hati banyak monyet berkeliaran disarankan tidak kesini pada siang hari karena sangat panas
english_translation: The entrance ticket price is cheap, there are many stalls if you want to buy snacks, be careful of the many monkeys roaming around, it's not recommended to come here during the day because it's very hot

text: Tempat wisata rekreasi keluarga. Parkir luas. Wahana banyak. Tersedia aneka macam kuliner yang bisa dibeli dengan koin floating market. Spot foto menarik.
english_translation: Family recreation attraction. Spacious parking. Many rides. Various culinary options available for purchase with floating market coins. Interesting photo spots.

text: Datang dah kesorean jadi blom sempat keliling semua dah gelap. Bagus sih meski malam banyak lampu2. Kita bisa keliling dunia dalam  1 hari aja nih disini.
english_translation: It was late when we arrived, so it was already dark and we didn't have time to explore everything. It's nice though, with many lights even at night. We can travel around the world in just 1 day here.

text: Salah satu spot yang Instagram bgt buat foto foto, luas bgt dgn pepohonan pinus dan lainnya. Jalanan agak licin dan bertanjak. Tiket masuk 40K~50K/ orang.
english_translation: One of the most Instagrammable spots for photos, very spacious with pine trees and others. The road is a bit slippery and uphill. Entrance fee 40K~50K/person.

text: Diminta kesadaran pengunjung utk menjaga kebersihan Dan membuang sampah pada tempat sampah yg disediakan. Karena sampah sudah mulai berserakan dimana mana
english_translation: Visitors are requested to maintain cleanliness and dispose of trash in the provided bins. Trash has started to be scattered everywhere.

text: Kereeen, tempatnya luas, banyak wahananya, kulinernya pun banyak, unik dan enak enak, dan disana juga ada fasilitas untuk mereka yg menggunakan kursi roda
english_translation: Awesome, the place is spacious, has many rides, the culinary options are also numerous, unique, and delicious, and there are also facilities for those who use wheelchairs.

text: Tempat wisata outbond yg sangat menyenangkan dn penuh tantangan dengan suasana alam yg indah dn udara yg segar serta spot foto yg asik di lembang bandung.
english_translation: An outbond tourist spot that is very fun and full of challenges, with beautiful natural scenery, fresh air, and cool photo spots in Lembang, Bandung.

text: Stone garden"wajib utk di kunjungi oleh wisatawan lokal & mancanegara, tempat nya asri alami,warisan nenek moyang kita,yg perlu trs di jaga & dilestarikan
english_translation: "Stone garden" is a must-visit for local & international tourists. The place is naturally beautiful and a heritage of our ancestors, which needs to be continuously protected and preserved.

text: Luas banget tempatnya adem & rindang. Tempat fasilitas yang memadai itulah yang bikin betah disini meskipun capek jalan2 karena sdh lama tidak jalan kaki.
english_translation: The place is huge, cool, and shady. The adequate facilities are what make me feel comfortable here, even though I'm tired from walking because I haven't walked for a long time.

text: tempat yang sangat berkesan karena saya menghabiskan waktu dengan teman-teman saya di tempat ini ketika kami memiliki libur singkat. berikut foto-fotonya.
english_translation: A very memorable place because I spent time with my friends in this place when we had a short holiday. Here are the photos.

text: Uda gak bisa berkata kata keren .. cuma google pelit gak mau ngegaji gua.. 😂😂👍👍 gua uda ulas ribuan tempat menarik juga.. mana ulasan gua trending terus …
english_translation: I can't say anything cool... Google is just stingy and doesn't want to pay me.. 😂😂👍👍 I've reviewed thousands of interesting places too... and my reviews keep trending...

text: Jalan menuju ke lokasi jelek berbatu. Menuju lokasi udara segar, dikelilingi pohon pinus. Menuju ke curug air nya menjadi coklat tdk seperti 5 tahun lalu.
english_translation: The road to the location is bad and rocky. Towards the location, the air is fresh, surrounded by pine trees. Heading to the waterfall, the water has turned brown, unlike 5 years ago.

text: Tempat enak sejuk bisa jadi referensi liburan low budget dan ada tempat makan yang harganya terjangkau,, hari Sabtu dan minggu rame di sini sampe penuh...
english_translation: A cool, pleasant place that can be a reference for a low-budget holiday, and there are affordable eateries. On Saturdays and Sundays, it's crowded here, even to the point of being full.

text: Tempat yang menakjubkan, pada saat saya kesana masih lumayan ramai dan juga tempatny ad beberapa yang tidak bisa beroperasi, dan jangan lupa banyak monyet
english_translation: An amazing place, when I went there it was still quite crowded and also some places were not operational, and don't forget there are many monkeys

text: Surga nya para fotografer dan yg suka selfie banyak banget tempat foto yg unik dan menarik di tempat jika membawa kamera DSLR harus bayar 50rb untuk foto2
english_translation: A paradise for photographers and selfie lovers, there are many unique and interesting photo spots. If you bring a DSLR camera, you have to pay 50,000 for photos.

text: Bayar tiket 10k, parkir motor 2k, bisa hiking sepuasnya sampe ke curug layung, cuma di curug layung nya diminta lg bayaran 10k/ orang tp ga dikasih tiket.
english_translation: Pay for the ticket 10k, motorcycle parking 2k, you can hike as much as you want all the way to Curug Layung, only at Curug Layung they asked for another payment of 10k/person but no ticket was given.

text: Makan siang sambil asyik nonton orang main flying fox.. rasa makanannya biasa saja tak ada yang istimewa.. musholla luas terawat baik, parkir juga luas...
english_translation: Lunch while enjoying watching people play flying fox.. the food tasted ordinary, nothing special.. spacious and well-maintained prayer room, spacious parking too...

text:
Tidak sebagus seperti pertama kali saya datang ksini, airnya sudah tidak jernih lagi, dan banyak lumut di kolam2nya

Mungkin karna impact corona kali yaaa
english_translation: Not as good as the first time I came here, the water is no longer clear, and there's a lot of moss in the pools. Maybe it's because of the corona impact.

text: Akses jln menuju curug malela yang sempit dan rawan banyak yang perlu dibenahi dari anak tangga turun / menuju curug moga kedepannya lebih nyaman didatangi
english_translation: The road access to Curug Malela is narrow and prone to issues, with many parts needing improvement, from the stairs descending to the waterfall. Hopefully, in the future, it will be more comfortable to visit.

text: Tempat nya sangat Sejuk , nyaman , sangat nyaman untuk camping , Karna bisa mendapatkan pemandangan sunsite dan sunrise serta ada juga suasana kabut . 👍👌 …
english_translation: The place is very cool, comfortable, and very suitable for camping, because you can get sunset and sunrise views, and there's also a foggy atmosphere. 👍👌 …

text: Wisata keluarga dengan bunga-bunga yang siap memanjakan mata. Tiketnya dulu murah sih sekarang udah agak mahal tapi masih worth it soalnya makin diperluas.
english_translation: Family tour with flowers ready to spoil the eyes. The tickets used to be cheap, now they're a bit expensive, but still worth it because it's been expanded more.

text: Jalan menuju kesini banyak sekali truknya. Dan jalan menuju ke dalam juga belum diaspal. Tapi tempatnya indaaah sekali. Terbayar semua ketika sampai disini
english_translation: The road to get here has a lot of trucks. And the road to get inside is not yet paved. But the place is very beautiful. It was all worth it when I arrived here.

text: suasana nyaman buat keluarga apalagi bawa putra putri ..nuansa sejuk ada kereta yg mengelilingi kolam dan ada sepeda..buat keliling lembah dewata...sip deh
english_translation: A comfortable atmosphere for families, especially when bringing children. A cool ambiance with a train that circles the pond and there are bicycles to ride around the Valley of the Gods. Great!

text: Tempatnya menarik... kesini grgr mau ke rainbow slide sih hehe disamping itu ada feeding animal, floating marketnya yg disuguhi dengan pemandangan yg bagus
english_translation: The place is interesting... came here because I wanted to go to the rainbow slide hehe. Beside that, there's animal feeding, and the floating market which is served with a nice view.

text: Tempatnya keren, pas banget kesini weekday dan pagi". Ada banyak ky pedagang tp dia kasih banyak informasi soal wisata ini. Suka bgt dengan suasanannya 💕 …
english_translation: The place is cool, perfect to visit on a weekday and in the morning. There are many vendors, but they give a lot of information about this attraction. I really like the atmosphere 💕 …

text:
Masuk kesini udah dapet 2x minuman.. pas masuk sama pas keluar, asik banget..
Spot fav ku yang jembatannya.. bagus banget pokoknya. Sangat recommended! 👍 …
english_translation:
Got 2 drinks just by entering... one when I came in and one when I left, it was so fun..
My favorite spot is the bridge.. it's really good, overall. Highly recommended! 👍 …

text: Tempatnya bagus,di deket campground ada toilet,cuma kadang kalo lagi rame banyak alaynya berisik teriak2 malem2,padahal yang punya kuping buka mereka doang
english_translation: The place is nice, there are toilets near the campground. It's just that sometimes when it's crowded, there are a lot of noisy "alay" (a term for someone considered obnoxious or disruptive, often associated with loud music and behavior) shouting at night, as if they're the only ones with ears.

text:
Tempat Lumayan Bagus, Cocok untuk Camping Pemula, tapi Overall semua cocok tapi Mahal di Parkir 10.000
Masuk 17.500,
Pengelolaan mungkin lebih diperbaiki..
english_translation:
Pretty Good Place, Suitable for Beginner Camping, but Overall everything is suitable except for the Expensive Parking, 10,000.
Entrance 17,500.
Management could be improved.

text:
Untuk yang belum pernah kemari pasti ga kecewa kemari, tempatnya asik, para pedagang aksesoris & makanan pinggir jalan pada ramah.
Biaya masuk 25rban/orang
english_translation:
For those who have never been here, you definitely won't be disappointed. The place is cool, and the street vendors selling accessories and food are all friendly.
The entrance fee is around 25,000 per person.

text: Harga tiket masuk 15rb tapi kalau bawa peralatan kamera yg profesional harga tiketnya nambah lagi cukup mahal. spot foto banyak, ada patung2 binatang lucu.
english_translation: The entrance fee is 15,000 rupiah, but if you bring professional camera equipment, the ticket price increases significantly, quite expensive. There are many photo spots, with cute animal statues.

text: Yg ke arah ke kabupaten Bandung barat bisa mampir mandi, makan + ke aneka wahana permainan, bisa foto" dg view hutan Pinus, hawanya jg seger adem pisan cuy
english_translation: Those heading towards West Bandung Regency can stop by for a bath, a meal, and to enjoy various amusement rides. You can also take photos with a pine forest view, and the air is really fresh and cool, dude.

text: Skrng sudah banyak berubah,lebih terawat...tapi yang saya TDK sukai adalah penjualnya banyak yg suka ngikutin kmna kita pergi😁jadi agak gak nyaman sdkit😁 …
english_translation: It has changed a lot now, it's more well-maintained... but what I don't like is that many of the sellers follow us everywhere 😁 so it's a bit uncomfortable 😁...

text: Pemandangan alam dengan batu2 besar, sangat indah di ketinggian Gunung Masigit, Citatah, Bandung Barat. Jalan kaki tidak jauh dari tempat parkir kendaraan.
english_translation: A beautiful natural landscape with large rocks at the heights of Mount Masigit, Citatah, West Bandung. A short walk from the vehicle parking area.

text: Ntapslah air curug tilu-nya... Hanya aksesnya aja jauh, dan medannya lumayan berbahaya, terjal, licin, sekitar setengah jam jalan kaki dari parkiran motor.
english_translation: The water of Curug Tilu is amazing... Only the access is far, and the terrain is quite dangerous, steep, slippery, about half an hour's walk from the motorcycle parking.

text:
Untuk htm 2orang plus mobil tadi saya di kenakan biaya 70rb murah bgt sihh...
Apalagi tadi cuaca terang menderang gada kabut jadi hasil foto jadi bagus"...
english_translation: For the entrance fee for 2 people plus a car, I was charged 70,000, which is very cheap... Especially since the weather was bright and clear with no fog, so the photos turned out great...

text: Duh banyak ormas, parkir bayar lagi.. kan sudah ada di tiket bayar 3rb kok bayar lagi parkir.. tolong dong ormasnya dibilangin aja bikin suasana gak enak..
english_translation: There are so many community organizations, and we have to pay for parking again... The ticket already includes a 3,000 [rupiah] fee, why do we have to pay for parking again? Please, tell these community organizations to stop creating an unpleasant atmosphere.

text: Lokasi strategis, mudah di jangkau, fasilitas lengkap, pengalaman yg berkesan belanja dgn  menggunakan koin, wisata yang menawarkan pengalaman yang menarik
english_translation: Strategic location, easy to reach, complete facilities, memorable experience shopping with coins, a tour that offers an interesting experience

text: Tempat yg selalu jadi pelarian sr sumpek nya jakarta. Lihatbdedaunan dan pohon pinus seketika hilang rasa sumpek semua krn melihat keindahan ciptaan Tuhan.
english_translation: A place that always becomes an escape from the stuffiness of Jakarta. Looking at the leaves and pine trees, the stuffiness immediately disappears upon seeing the beauty of God's creation.

text: Liburan pertama kali ke Bandung pengen kesini. Enak banget banyak spot foto, adem sejuk. GK begtu ramai karna datangnya pagi pagi. Ada banyak jajanan juga.
english_translation: First time holidaying to Bandung, I wanted to come here. It's really nice, lots of photo spots, cool and refreshing. Not too crowded because I came early in the morning. There are also many snacks.

text: C bayi cantik seneng banget maen di sini.. kasih makan burung.. kasih makan rusa.. liat kelinci.. cuma dia pengen main flying fox tapi belum boleh... 🥰🥰🥰 …
english_translation: The beautiful baby is so happy playing here.. feeding the birds.. feeding the deer.. looking at the rabbits.. she just wants to try the flying fox but isn't allowed yet... 🥰🥰🥰 …

text: Curugnya sekarang kotor, dikasi pager pembatas juga jadi cuman bisa mandangin aja soalnya arusnya deras. Tapi suasanya adem asri dan udaranya sejuk banget.
english_translation: The waterfall is dirty now, and they put up a safety barrier, so you can only look at it because the current is strong. But the atmosphere is cool and serene, and the air is very refreshing.

text:
Salah satu destinasi favorit di bandung, terbaiklah pokoknya...
Yg paling terkesan tuh sama kebaikan org2 yg ada di sna yg ikhlas... 👌
Toplah pokoknya... …
english_translation:
One of Bandung's favorite destinations, the best for sure...
What impressed me the most was the sincerity and kindness of the people there... 👌
Top-notch, truly...

text: Tempat yang cocok buat mengajak keluarga berakhir pekan, atau sekedar mengajak yang terkasih jalan2 menikmati udara sejuk dan alam yang indah khas Lembang.
english_translation: A suitable place to bring the family for a weekend getaway, or simply to take your loved one for a stroll to enjoy the cool air and the beautiful natural scenery typical of Lembang.

text: Senang banget, bagus, keren, Mantap deh...👍👍 Banyak Foto² aku di Sarae Hills. Pokoknya Lokasi Keren dan Mantap 😀 puas aku...semuanya senang dan puas 👍👍😀😀 …
english_translation: So happy, good, cool, awesome...👍👍 Lots of my photos in Sarae Hills. All in all, a cool and awesome location 😀 I'm satisfied... everyone is happy and satisfied 👍👍😀😀 …

text: Tempat yang bagus dan luas untuk keluarga, banyak spot foto bagus, tempat makan yang nyaman, arena bermain anak. Saran untuk membawa payung atau jas hujan.
english_translation: A nice and spacious place for families, with many good photo spots, a comfortable dining area, and a children's play area. Suggest bringing an umbrella or raincoat.

text: Tempatnya bagus 🍃 Tapi sayang jalan akses kesini masih kurang bagus. Semoga pemerintah daerah bisa kasih perhatian lebih untuk tempat-tempat seperti ini. …

text:
Hawa sejuk khas lembang, permainan outbound anak yg cukup banyak dan seru, resort yang sepertinya harus dicoba nih.

text: Waktu kesini lagi berkabut jadi ngga bisa nikmatin banget. Tiket masuk per orang 20rb, tiket masuk mobil 15rb, parkir 5rb. Udaranya seger bau-bau belerang gitu

text: Tempat bangus banget akses bagus cuman ngingetin sih lebih baik nanya ke orang dari pada maps soal.nya klo ngikut maps masuk plosok2 gitu tapi tempat bagus kok

text: Nature pokona.... Indah jaga kekestariannya... Jabar, kbb, bandung itu banyak spot indah.. Hanya tinggal kepedulian pemerintah untuk menggali potensi wisata...

text:
Wow.. Amazing
Air terjunnya dibuat modern jadi tidak perlu berjalan kaki turun terlalu jauh sudah tiba di lokasi.

english_translation:
Wow.. Amazing
The waterfall is made modern so you don't need to walk down too far to reach the location.

text: Nostalgia januari 2020 lalu, meskipun namanya Stone Garden (taman batu), tapi nuansa disini lebih ke perbukitan karang👍. Berasa masuk ke Lautan versi daratan …

english_translation: A strategic place for beginners who want to hike or camp, the view is perfect for watching the sunset & sunrise, especially the city lights. Highly recommended! 🙂

text:
Ke sini karena penasaran dengan Rainbow Glide. Dan penasarn itu terbayar. Anak2 puas sekali.

Tips: pastikan tinggi badan minimal 110cm untuk bisa naik wahana.

Came here out of curiosity about the Rainbow Glide. And the curiosity paid off. The kids were very satisfied.

text:
Banyak cafe yang lucu2 di dalemnya

Lots of cute cafes inside
Lots of good photo spots

text: Tiket masuk 50rb. Tp spot foto disini sangat banyak. Layak untuk harga segitu. Tp memang akses kesini sangat macet apalagi kalau hari weekend dan libur panjang

text: Bisa piknik depan telaga nih. Aksesoris bawa sendiri. Tiket masuk 15ribu/orang. Bisa sewa tikar 20ribu. Kalo mau bawa makanan dari luar kena charge 10rb/orang.

text: Suasana yg asri, udara sejuk, pemandangan yg begitu indah... Cocok buat refreshing keluarga, maupun kumpul" acara kantor, ada wahana juga disini yg berbayar...

text:

text: Tidak boleh bawa makanan, banyak yang bawa anjing seharusnya kalau di area publik seperti itu tidak diizinkan membawa anjing karena tidak semua orang nyaman ya.

tempatnya enak apalagi buat healing beramai-ramai, udaranya segar sejuk dan dingin.

text:

text: Nie tempat bener² menyenangkan untuk dikunjungi. Suasana hutan pinus nya bener² memanjakan mata hati dan pikiran. Layak untuk masuk dalam list prioritas liburan.

text: Ada kendaraan angkut gratis dari parkiran ke atas dan sebaliknya, sebaiknya dimanfaatkan atau kalau mau jalan kaki juga tidak dilarang kok. Jangan lupa piknik ya

text: Tempat ini sangat menyenangkan. Banyak spot foto yang sangat bagus untuk diposting di Instagram. Dan di pintu gerbang kita akan naik mini bus gratis untuk turun

text:
tadi siang  (H+2 lebaran) boyong anak & istri ke stone garden citatah.
viewnya keren !
untuk warga sebagai pengelolanya mohon di atas sediakan tempat sampah yaa.

this afternoon (H+2 Eid) brought my child & wife to Stone Garden Citatah.

text: Buat Yang Suka Taman Bunga, ini Recommend Pokonya..  Viewnya Sangat Bagus Dan Indah.  Lebih enak Pagi hari atau Sore Ketempat Ini.  Biar hasil Foto Lebih Bagus..

text: Tempat bagus, ada bangunan bersejarah dunia di sini. Sejuk juga, pelayanan luar biasa, harga murah terjangkau, satu kawasan dengan cafe dan resto banyak pilihan.

text: Lokasinya mudah di jangkau. Cocok untuk rekreasi keluarga karna ada outboundnya juga. Untuk tiket masuk cukup murah. Banyak wahana yang bisa kamu lakukam disini!

text: Cocok untuk mendaki santai. Mencapai puncak hanya selama 1 jam atau kurang. Bawa keluarga Anda ke sini pada akhir pekan, tetapi harap jaga kebersihan tempat ini

text:
Tempatnya bagus dan dikelola dengan sangat baik, orang2 disana ramah banget..
Rekomen buat yang mau prewedd disini 🤗
Meski hujan tp tetep totalitas tanpa batas …

The place is nice and very well managed, the people there are super friendly..
Recommended for those who want to do their pre-wedding photos here 🤗
Even though it rained, they were still fully committed without limits…

text: Masyarakat sekitar khususnya pedagang ramah semua. Hanya cuaca tidak mendukung  selang waktu baru 30menitan kita berjalan . Gerimismengundang hujan sangat lebat.

text: Tempat yang sangat indah,dari tempat parkir ke lokasi Sanghyang heuleut lumayan lah tracking nya.semoga bisa lebih terurus lagi tempatnya oleh pemerintah terkait

text:
Buat yg jenuh sama macetnya bandung , disini cocok utk menenangkan , ga terlalu jauh jalur hiking nya tp pemandangannya bagus bgt
Tapi tolong dong jangan nyampah

For those tired of Bandung's traffic jams, this place is perfect for relaxation. The hiking trail isn't too difficult, but the scenery is fantastic.
But please, don't litter.

text:
Bagus.. bersih.. indah.. luas..
lebih dijaga dan dirawat lagi..
jalan aspal menuju area diperbaiki byk yg berlubang bahaya.. tk. sukses byk turis yg kesana yah..
english_translation:
Good.. clean.. beautiful.. spacious..
It should be maintained and cared for more..
The asphalt road leading to the area is repaired, many potholes are dangerous.. Thank you. May it be successful and attract many tourists..

text: Bagus, tempatnya luas, bersih. Bisa pesen online dan dapet vocher gratis jembatan gantung. Datang ke sini pas lagi hujan sore sore jadi foto2nya kurang maksimal.

text: Di dpn pintu masuk ada yg ngehadang tp jln aja jng berhenti. Naik motor berdua tiket masuk sma parkir 76rb. Di dlm banyak yg jualan dan jual jasa buat fotoin gtu

text: Masya Allah cantikkk.. Dan pas ke sini lagi cerah cuacanya.. Tapi 1 yg ingin saya katakan belanjanya jgn di atas. Mending di bawah. Klo diatas harganya mahal euy

text:
Tempat wisata dlm kota di Bandung, sangat semarak di Gedung Asia Africa ataupun di jalan Asia Africanya.
Sangan melegenda juga terkenal di Indonesia bahkan Dunia
english_translation:
Tourist attractions within the city of Bandung are very lively at the Asia Africa Building or along Asia Africa Street.
It is very legendary and famous in Indonesia, even the world.

text: Jika Anda menyukai alam dan menyukainya Anda harus mengunjungi tempat ini, Bukit Senyum Tempat ini begitu bersih udaranya, segar. Anda bisa outbond dan camping.

text: Ajak keliling jabar, singgah ke tangkuban perahu, penjual nya baik2 memberikan info seputar kawah, jd lebih tau..ada 4 kawah, tp cuma liat kawah yg gede nya aja,

text: CIC OKE. tempatnya nyaman, aman, ada toilet yang airnya ngalis dan pondok juga buat ngecas.  Mushola juga ada. Kalau jalan sekitar 100an meter bisa dapet curug tilu.

text: Belum terlalu banyak wahana main untuk anak nya. Food court nya kurang menarik... dan pagi belom pada buka. Tempat nya besar.. enak untuk dipakai bersantai.. adem...
english_translation: Not many rides for the child yet. The food court is not very appealing... and they weren't open in the morning yet. The place is large... nice for relaxing... cool...

text: Tempatnya asik dan banyak spot foto dan wahananya, akan tetapi air sungainya banyak sampah dan berbusa. Saran saya lebih baik difokuskan kepada kebersihan sungainya,
english_translation: The place is nice with many photo spots and attractions, however, the river is full of trash and foamy. My suggestion is to focus more on cleaning the river.

text: Mantap! Tempatnya adem dan enak untuk dikunjungi. Saya kesitu naik wahana outbond, flying fox... Seru bangettt!!! Ada wahana outbond lain juga loh selain flying fox!
english_translation: Awesome! The place is cool and nice to visit. I went there to ride the outbound rides, the flying fox... So much fun!!! There are other outbound rides too, you know, besides the flying fox!

text: liburan ke lembang ga lengkap klo blm ke tempat ini, byk kegiatan yg bisa dilakukan disini.. dari mulai gathering, piknik keluarga, outbound, offroad dan lain lain..
english_translation: A vacation to Lembang isn't complete if you haven't been to this place. There are many activities you can do here, starting from gatherings, family picnics, outbound, offroad, and so on.

text: Nyaman  sudah mulai tertata dengan baik, cuman hati2 kalau bawa makanan jangan ditenteng di kantong kresek lebih baik dimasukan dalam tas, soalnya banyak monyet liar
english_translation: Comfortable and well-organized, just be careful if you bring food, don't carry it in a plastic bag, it's better to put it in a bag because there are many wild monkeys.

text: Taman di hutan cemara dengan design dan konsep yang keren. Memanjakan mata dan udara yang sangat segar. Untuk orang tua atau ada osteoporosis sangat tidak dianjurkan
english_translation: A pine forest park with a cool design and concept. A feast for the eyes with very fresh air. Not recommended for the elderly or those with osteoporosis.

text:
Taman nya bagus terawat & luas.
Banyak tukang makanan, bisa beli makan sambil naik perahu sampan.
Untuk beli makan harus tukar uang dengan koin, jadi kurang praktis.
english_translation:
The park is well-maintained and spacious.
There are many food vendors, you can buy food while riding a sampan boat.
To buy food, you have to exchange money for coins, so it's less practical.

text: Hanya bisa ditempuh dgn berjalan kaki selama 1 jam dari tempat parkir. Disarankan untuk yang memiliki kebugaran fisik yg baik karena jalan yg ditempuh lumayan berat.
english_translation: Only reachable by walking for 1 hour from the parking lot. Recommended for those with good physical fitness as the path is quite strenuous.

text: Masuk ke dalam dr jalan raya sejuk dingin cuma wahananya byk utk anak kecil aja ..kd yg remaja dewasa cuma.bepotoan doang disini dg latar hutan pinus yg dibuat taman
english_translation: Entering from the highway, it's cool and cold, but there are many rides only for small children. For teenagers and adults, they just take photos here with the pine forest background made into a park.

text: Dari beberapa tahun gk ada perkembangan. Kalau udh pernah sekali kesini lagi pasti dah bosen. Makanannya enak dan kurang varian. Harga cukup dengan porsi yg sedikit.
english_translation: There hasn't been any development for several years. If you've been here once, you'll definitely be bored. The food is good but lacks variety. The price is quite high for the small portion.

text: dateng waktu  hujan deras, terpaksa beli jas hujan dan payung disana, tempat makan dan bermain tetap buka waktu hujan  hanya aksesnya aja yang agak sulit kalau hujan
english_translation: It rained heavily, so I had to buy a raincoat and an umbrella there. The food and play areas remained open during the rain, only access became a bit difficult when it rained.

text:
Tempat yang indah.
Yang sangat disesal kan. Pengunjung yang suka buang sampah sembarangan..
Banyak banget sampah di buang begtu aja disela sela dan di lubang2  batu.
english_translation:
A beautiful place.
What is very regrettable. Visitors who like to litter..
There is so much trash just thrown in between and in the holes of the rocks.

text: Pernah mengunjungi floating market ini di masa sebelum pandemi. Lokasinya sejuk meskipun terik. Konsep jajannya di perahu-perahu apung. Ada resto pinggir kolam koinya
english_translation: Visited this floating market before the pandemic. The location is cool even though it's hot. The food concept is from boats on the water. There's a restaurant by the koi pond.

text:
Dateng kesini waktu weekdays
Jadi nya sepi, bebas mau foto foto hehe
Tiket dapat ditukar dengan es lilin rasa buah.
Di dalam bisa beli tanaman juga
Tempat parkir luas
english_translation:
Came here on a weekday
So it was quiet, free to take photos hehe
Tickets can be exchanged for fruit-flavored ice pops.
You can also buy plants inside
Spacious parking

text: Air terjun di Ciwangun Indah Camp ini termasuk tipe air terjun tiga tingkat. Di sini wisatawan tidak disarankan untuk berenang, karena kedalamannya mencapai 15 meter.
english_translation: The waterfall at Ciwangun Indah Camp is a three-tiered waterfall. Tourists are advised not to swim here because the depth reaches 15 meters.

text: Tempat yang nyaman utk jalan jalan dg keluarga. Ada danau buatan kecil, utk main perahu mini. Alangkah serunya kalau ada atraksi perang air antar kapal bajak laut lho
english_translation: A comfortable place for a walk with the family. There's a small artificial lake for playing with mini boats. It would be so exciting if there were water fight attractions between pirate ships!

text: Cocok utk wisata keluarga tp jangan wkt weekend atau libur panjang. Bakalan ramai sekali. Banyak penjual makanan ringan. Ada slide rainbow, antri panjang wkt weekend.
english_translation: Suitable for family trips, but avoid weekends or long holidays. It will be very crowded. Lots of snack vendors. There's a rainbow slide, long queues on weekends.

text: Curug tilu mantap buat goweser dengan trek yg menantang dengan pemandangan yg indah meskipun harus bersusah payah membawa sepeda tapi terobati dengan keidahan alamnya
english_translation: Curug Tiga is great for cyclists with a challenging track and beautiful scenery. Even though it's tough to carry the bikes, it's worth it for the natural beauty.

text: Nuansa alam yg sejuk, bersih, tmpt ibdh pun ok, untuk kantin mkann kurng lengkap n kurng enk sprt yg tmn sy mkn soto itu dagingny sm mie ny keras kyk kurng matang gtu
english_translation: The nuances of nature are cool and clean. The worship place is also okay. For the canteen, the food is not very complete and not very tasty. For example, my friend ate soto, and the meat and noodles were hard, as if they weren't cooked enough.

text: Cocok buat camping asyik bersama keluarga di grafika cikole, udah disiapin semuanya, tenda, api unggun, jagung bakar, pop mie. Ga pake repot, tinggal happy-happy aja.
english_translation: Perfect for a fun camping trip with the family at Grafika Cikole. Everything is prepared: tent, campfire, grilled corn, instant noodles. No hassle, just have fun.

text: Gunung Tangkuban Perahu yang terletak di Bandung Barat merupakan tempat wisata pegunungan lengkap dengan aroma belerang dan panorama alam yang sangat memanjakan mata.
english_translation: Mount Tangkuban Perahu, located in West Bandung, is a mountain tourist destination complete with the scent of sulfur and breathtaking natural panoramas.

text: Dingin tapi ga sedingin kawah putih, bau belerang juga, orang orang disini ramah ramah banget boleh dimintain tolong buat take foto dan tau trik shootnya keren keren,
english_translation: Cold, but not as cold as the White Crater. There's also a sulfur smell. The people here are very friendly, you can ask them for help taking photos, and they know cool shooting tricks.

text:
spot bagus untuk penggemar alam, petualangan dan penggemar fotografi.

banyak spot catchy untuk dijelajahi, sering dijadikan lokasi prewedding, dan syuting video klip
english_translation:
A great spot for nature, adventure, and photography enthusiasts.

Many catchy spots to explore, often used as a pre-wedding location and for music video shoots.

text:
Tempat wisata keluarga yg bagus,
Banyak bunga bunga yg indah
Banyak jg di sediakan tempat untuk foto foto,
Kemarin pas liburan sekolah jadi pengunjungnya sangat ramai
english_translation:
Good family tourist spot,
Lots of beautiful flowers
Many spots are also provided for taking photos,
Yesterday during the school holidays, the visitors were very crowded

text: Buat yang mau camping, perjalanan ke puncak sekitar 2 jam lebih dan jika mau sampai Tangkuban Perahu kira-kira 3 jam. Untuk yang hanya jalan2, tutup sampai jam 4 sore
english_translation: For those who want to camp, the journey to the summit is about 2 hours plus, and if you want to reach Tangkuban Perahu, it's approximately 3 hours. For those just sightseeing, it's closed at 4 PM.

text: Tempat wisata alam luas dengan berbagai jenis anggrek dan spot foto menarik. Tersedia restoran dengan tempat yang unik, taman bermain anak, jembatan dan camping park.
english_translation: A vast natural tourist spot with various types of orchids and interesting photo spots. A restaurant with a unique setting, a children's playground, a bridge, and a camping park are available.

text: Tempat outbond yang luar biasaaa. EO nya sih sebetulnya, kalo tempatnya mah standar aja. Buat Team Galaxy Adventure, makasih banget udah fasilitasi kami. Kalian keren
english_translation: An amazing outbound location. The EO, actually, the place itself is just standard. To Team Galaxy Adventure, thank you so much for facilitating us. You guys are cool.

text: Love this place. Serasa kembali ke zaman batu. View nya juga luar biasa. Kl beruntung juga bisa liat kereta api yang lewat di atas jembatan dari kejauhan, asik kan...
english_translation: Love this place. Feels like going back to the Stone Age. The view is also amazing. If you're lucky, you can also see trains passing over the bridge from a distance, cool right...

text: Tempat dan pemandangan yang bagus dan bersih. Hanya perlu perbaikan, harus meminta untuk mengisi stempel di paspor setiap kali kami tiba di pos. Akan lebih berkesan.
english_translation: A nice and clean place with good views. Only needs improvement, have to ask for the stamp in the passport every time we arrive at the post. It would be more memorable.

text: Salah satu alternatif wisata di Lembang, susananya cukup menyenangkan. Banyak pilihan makanan dan permainan untuk anak2 dan keluarga. Cuacanya juga sejuk khas Lembang
english_translation: One of the tourist alternatives in Lembang, the atmosphere is quite pleasant. Many food and game options for children and families. The weather is also cool, typical of Lembang.

text: Tempat yg cocok untuk berlibur bersama keluarga, harga terjangkau pemandangan seperto berada di pulau dewata, kita juga bisa menikmati perahu untuk mengelilingi danau
english_translation: A suitable place for a family vacation, affordable prices, with a view like being on the Island of the Gods. We can also enjoy a boat ride around the lake.

text: jauh-jauh dari semarang KKL ke jakarta-bandung. Nginep disini sehari, dingin banget astaga. Tapi pemandangannya indah banget dan tempatnya cocok buat liburan keluarga
english_translation: Far from Semarang, a field trip to Jakarta-Bandung. Stayed here for a day, it was so cold, oh my. But the scenery was really beautiful and the place is suitable for a family vacation.

text: Mantap buat acara acara kantor, dan klo mau ksini better pakai EO jadi lebih enak.  Wisata ada paintball, Flyngfox, jmbatan gantung, jembatan goyang dan turun tebing,
english_translation: Great for office events, and if you want to come here, it's better to use an event organizer to make it more enjoyable. Activities include paintball, ziplining, suspension bridge, swaying bridge, and cliff descending.

text: saya suka monumen dan jembatan golden gate karena sangat tinggi dari tanah tapi saya pikir perlu lebih banyak situs atraksi karena itu cukup kecil untuk objek wisata
english_translation: I like the Golden Gate Bridge monument because it's very high from the ground, but I think it needs more attraction sites because it's quite small for a tourist spot.

text:
Recomended untuk.wisata keluarga.....
Masuk untuk anak2 dan dewasa.
Lengkap dengan wisata kuliner pasar apungnya.

Sudah kedua kalinya bawa anak2 kesini..gak bosenin😁
english_translation:
Recommended for family trips.....
Entrance for children and adults.
Complete with floating market culinary tours.

This is the second time I've brought the kids here..it's not boring😁

text: what a great place 🥰 lovely to spend your time with your family or your beloved one. Buibu yang suka anggrek, pas banget dah kesini. tjakep-tjakep banget anggreknya 😍
english_translation: what a great place 🥰 lovely to spend your time with your family or your beloved one. For those who like orchids, this is the perfect place to visit. The orchids are so beautiful 😍

text: Hanya 1 kata... " mantaaap "... Pertama kesini dan jadi pengunjung pertama juga jadi bisa lebih berkesan dan ambil gambar hanya sekedar buat selfy lebih fress lagi...
english_translation: Just 1 word... "awesome"... First time here and the first visitor too, so it's more memorable and I can take pictures just for a fresh selfie...

text: Tempat favorit kalo ke lembang, luas bgt dan bersih. Ada pasar terapung, kulineran di pinggir danau, udara.a udah pasti sejuk. Wajib kesini kalo lagi di lembang ya...
english_translation: A favorite spot when going to Lembang, very spacious and clean. There's a floating market, culinary delights by the lake, and the air is definitely cool. A must-visit when you're in Lembang...

text: Kebun bunga dengan ukuran yang tidak terlalu luas tetapi lumayan cantik dan tertata rapih. Memiliki beberapa spot cantik untuk berfoto. Tersedia mushola dan restauran.
english_translation: A flower garden that is not too spacious but is quite beautiful and well-arranged. It has several beautiful spots for taking photos. A prayer room and a restaurant are available.

text: Nama tempat nya Orchid forest (hutan anggrek) ternyata anggrek nya cm dikit dipikir byk.... msh byk anggrek yg dijual di toko tanaman.... tiket masuk lmyn mahal lg 😂 …
english_translation: The place is called Orchid Forest (orchid forest) but it turns out there are only a few orchids, I thought there would be many... there are still more orchids sold at plant shops... and the entrance ticket is quite expensive 😂

text: Tempatnya bagus dan luas. Banyak pemandangan yang bisa memanjakan mata. Udara bersih. Letaknya yang berada di lembah agak sulit ditemukan jika berkendara dengan cepat.
english_translation: The place is nice and spacious. There are many views that can spoil the eyes. The air is clean. Its location in the valley is a bit difficult to find if you are driving fast.

text: cocok banget buat pemula yang mau nyobain hiking/camping. disini bisa menikmati sunrise tanpa harus cape mendaki. n dont worry dipuncak juga udah tersedia toilet ya😀 …
english_translation: It's really suitable for beginners who want to try hiking/camping. Here you can enjoy the sunrise without having to climb tiredly. And don't worry, there are already toilets available at the peak 😀…

text: Jalannya lumayan jauh dr Bandung kota, suasana sejuk namun di lokasi terlalu banyak penjual makanan dan aksesoris jd tak begitu menikmati kawah dan pemandangan alamnya
english_translation: The road is quite far from Bandung city, the atmosphere is cool but there are too many food and accessory vendors at the location, so I couldn't fully enjoy the crater and the natural scenery.

text: Pas untuk kamu yg ingin camping di tempat tinggi, tapi mager tracking jauh. Buka 24 jam tanpa harus booking dulu. Jangan lupa bawa sleeping bag, dingin battt brohhhh..
english_translation: Perfect for those who want to camp in high places but are too lazy for a long hike. Open 24 hours without needing to book in advance. Don't forget to bring a sleeping bag, it's super cold, brohhhh..

text: tempat wisata yg family friendly, namun agak disayangkan selama pandemi covid-19 tidak semua wahana bermain buka, dan wisatawan pasca PSBB pun taka seramai sedia kala.
english_translation: A family-friendly tourist spot, but unfortunately, during the COVID-19 pandemic, not all rides were open, and post-PSBB tourists were not as numerous as before.

text: Tempatnya indah, sayang air terjunnya banyak sampahnya. Harus hati-hati saat makan, terkadang ada monyet yg merebut makanan. Jajanannya enak, pedagangnya sangat humble
english_translation: The place is beautiful, too bad the waterfall is full of trash. You have to be careful when eating, sometimes monkeys snatch your food. The snacks are delicious, and the vendors are very humble.

text: Taman bunga yang cantik, namun areanya tidak terlalu besar. Sosmed-able! Banyak spot foto cantik. Datang bersama pasangan cocok sekali. Romantis macam drama korea.😁😋 …
english_translation: Beautiful flower garden, but the area is not too big. Social media-worthy! Lots of beautiful photo spots. Very suitable to come with a partner. Romantic like a Korean drama.😁😋

text: Tempatnya bagus buat foto-foto, fasilitas lumayan lengkap, hanya saja masih ada arena yang belum selesai, maklum masih baru. Tapi sepertinya akan jadi lebih bagus lagi
english_translation: The place is good for taking photos, the facilities are quite complete, only that there are still some areas that are not finished, understandable as it's still new. But it seems like it will become even better.

text: sekarang udah enak banget, perkembangan tempat wisata nya lumayan cepet. dulu pas awal awal buka ke sini masih pada kosong, sekarang udah beda banget, udah lebih bagus
english_translation: It's really nice now, the development of the tourist spot is quite fast. Back when it first opened and I came here, it was still empty, now it's completely different, much better.

text: Wisata yang sangat menyenangkan. Harga tiket 20 K untuk hari biasa dan 30K untuk hari Libur. Tiket bisa ditukarkan dengan segelas minuman dengan pilihan Milo, kopi dll
english_translation: A very enjoyable tour. Ticket prices are 20K for weekdays and 30K for holidays. Tickets can be exchanged for a glass of drinks with choices of Milo, coffee, etc.

text: sukaaa tempatnya adem,sejuk,hijau sekali, penetralisir pikiran❤ jaga selalu kehijauannya semoga sampai aku kunjungi lagi nanti masih tetap ada dan tetap hijau aamiin ❤
english_translation: I love the place, it's cool, fresh, very green, a mind-neutralizer ❤ May its greenery always be maintained so that when I visit again, it's still there and remains green, amen ❤

text: Enakeun banget pemandangannya walaupun pas kesana airnya lagi keruh karna mungkin hari sebelumnya ujan. Tiket masuk 20k terus sewa pelampung 15k doang. Ada toilet juga
english_translation: The scenery is really beautiful, even though the water was murky when I went, probably because it rained the day before. The entrance ticket is 20k, and renting a life jacket is only 15k. There are also toilets.

text: Tempat yang cocok buat mengajak anak-anak kesini karena tersedia banyak aktivitas permainan outbond, disini juga terdapat penginapan yang dikelilingi oleh hutan pinus.
english_translation: A suitable place to bring children here because there are many outbound play activities available, and there are also lodgings surrounded by pine forests.

text:
Sangat disarankan untuk transit wisatawan dengan fasilitas yang tidaj mengecewakan

Parkir yang luas, ruang ruang untuk makan rombongan juga ada beberapa ruang...
Sipp
english_translation:
Highly recommended for tourist transit with facilities that do not disappoint.

Ample parking, and there are also several rooms for group dining...
Great

text: Bagian dari kaki gunung burangrang. Family camp sangat cocok untuk destinasi ke tempat ini. Terorganisir dengan baik dengan tetap mempertahankan ekosistem. Pertahankan
english_translation: Part of the foothills of Mount Burangrang. Family camps are very suitable for a destination here. Well-organized while maintaining the ecosystem. Maintain

text:
Tempatnya besar dan luas.

english_translation:
The place is big and spacious.
Get your hats ready...
There's education for kids..
Making food, drinks, wanting to be a police officer, firefighter, businessman, all sorts of things...
It's fun too...

text: Uhh enak buat lepasin masalah idup lah pokoknya :V apalagi bawa pacar, duduk disaungnya berdua ahay🤣 tapi diusahakan pake sepatu warna putih ya, banyak kapur soalnya …
english_translation: Uhh, it's really nice for letting go of life's problems, basically :V Especially if you bring your girlfriend, sitting in the shade together, ahay🤣 But try to wear white shoes, there's a lot of chalk...

text: Suka banget, tempatnya indah, bersih, spot foto2nya banyak dan romantis, dan..... tiketnya bersahabat, pertahankan dan tingkatkan ya, biar pengunjungnya semakin banyak
english_translation: Really love it, the place is beautiful, clean, there are many romantic photo spots, and..... the tickets are affordable. Please maintain and improve it, so that more visitors will come.

text: Nyaman tempat nya, saran aja, kalo mau nyantai jangan weekend ,susah cari lahan buat dirikan tenda, cocok untuk pemula yg mau belajar naik gunung kayak saya. Heheh😇😁 …
english_translation: Comfortable place. Just a suggestion, if you want to relax, don't come on the weekend. It's hard to find space to set up a tent. Suitable for beginners who want to learn to hike like me. Heheh😇😁 …

text: Tempatnya sejuk,keren dan indah tp perlu badan yg fit buat sampe ke Curug nya,perjalanan pulang tenaganya harus 2x lipat sama tenanga sewaktu mulai perjalanan ke curug
english_translation: The place is cool, awesome, and beautiful, but you need to be fit to reach the waterfall. The journey back requires twice the energy compared to the journey to the waterfall.

text: Penuh dengan pemanadangan yg indah udara yg amat sejuk , outbond untuk anak anak dan dewasa , tersedia juga berbagai macam untuk penginapan dan makanan nyaa jugaa enak
english_translation: Full of beautiful scenery and very cool air, outdoor activities for children and adults, various types of accommodation are also available, and the food is also delicious.

text: sumpah banget ga bisa ngapa2in lu disini..ga seindah apa yg lu liat...semua serba bayar..ga cocok lu bawa keluarga apalagi rombonga..ga ad pemandian air panas disini..
english_translation: I swear you can't do anything here... it's not as beautiful as what you see... everything costs money... it's not suitable for you to bring your family, let alone a group... there are no hot springs here...

Lumayan buat healing kalau bawa anak kecil..

english_translation:
It's quite good for healing if you bring small children..
A suggestion for the arena, like the rabbit feeding area, is to have a sign to let visitors know whether entering the rabbit area is paid or not.

text:
